text: Do students find online education at home more beneficial than at school? Education plays the biggest role in the daily life of modern society. Education is taught in various ways because each person has a certain way of learning. The idea of "One size fits all" is outdated and not as effective for learning compared to having multiple and unique ways of education learning.  Online education is one of the various and unique ways of education in the twenty-first century. Online education has become a popular alternative to education on school campus  Students taking online classes may find it easier to learn at an environment that is more comfortable than a school  Online classes may help a person's ability to learn by having the student accommodate to an environment more comfortable for learning. Students can take online education to "Get back on track" or to learn in a more friendly environment.  Online classes can provide help to persons with learning disabilities, such as those with anxiety. Learning disabilities prevent the student from fully grasping and understanding the context of a topic being taught in classroom  Online education is beneficial in many ways not having to be late to school because of transportation, significantly lower risk of bullying, and being able to learn at a calmer pace. Online education can be a place for students to achieve success at an environment more accommodating and more friendly. At a school campus students may have difficulty with social interaction while online education provides an "escape" to issues that affect the student's ability to learn.  Attending classes at home come with several benefits and provide another opportunity to learn in a place where education is more effective to the student.  The idea of "One size fits all" is certainly wrong because not every student has the same way of thinking; therefore, every student is unique and do not all learn the same the way. Students will benefit from online classes if these classes teach in a way where the student learns best. Any environment where education can thrive and improve a person's learning capacity is the best place to learn.

The Electoral College is a democratic cornerstone in the United States, but it is not without its flaws. One of the most contentious aspects is that it can sometimes lead to victories in electoral votes without a popular majority win. This was seen in the 2000 election, when George W. Bush won the presidency despite losing the national popular vote by over 500,000 votes. 

Another issue is the potential for distorting the voting power of individuals based on where they live. Voters in smaller states have more influence due to the Electoral College structure, which assigns them more representation than voters in larger states. This is particularly problematic when considering that racial and ethnic minorities are often concentrated in denser urban areas. 

A further problem is the lack of incentive for third-party candidates to run for office. The Electoral College system benefits candidates who can secure narrow victories in a handful of key swing states, making it difficult for less mainstream candidates to gain a significant foothold. 

To address these issues, there are several alternative systems that have been proposed. A popular option is the adoption of a national popular vote. This would ensure the elected candidate has the support of the majority of voters across the country. Additionally, it would remove the potential for vote-counting irregularities and disputes that arise in close elections under the Electoral College system. 

Another alternative is a ranked-choice voting system. This allows voters to rank their choices rather than just selecting a single candidate. Eliminations occur when voters' lowest preferences are counted, ensuring that the winner ultimately has the support of the majority of voters. 

Ranked-choice voting also promotes more positive campaigning, as candidates must appeal to a wider range of voters to earn their second or third choices. In comparison, the Electoral College system can incentivize divisive or polarizing tactics that target swing states. 

In conclusion, while the Electoral College has upheld the tradition of American democracy, it is imperative to acknowledge its shortcomings. By embracing alternative systems such as ranked-choice voting or a national popular vote, we can bolster voter equality, encourage political engagement, and bolster the democratic process to ensure that every vote counts. 

Would you like me to expand on any of the points or provide further suggestions for alternative electoral systems?

Schooling has been around for thousands of years, and, as the rest of society has evolved, the traditional schooling technique has virtually stayed the same. Children still remain at desks, listening to their teachers lecture; kids still take home worksheets for extra practice called "homework." Standardized tests are still given, and kids are still excelling. However, as time goes on, more people have begun to question this type of schooling, and why it has not changed for over 1000 years. A recent change people have suggested, with the rise of technology, is "distance learning", a way to "attend" school from the confines of ones own home.  While this idea seems promising, it is not a good change for the schooling system because,  for the vast majority of students, it will cause unneeded distractions,  a less stimulating environment,  and the inability to distinguish home and work life.  As children grow and learn, they are more likely to choose play over work. Because of this, kids are often distracted from their assignments in school,  whether it be with the thoughts of their Buzz Lightyear action figure they can not wait to play with or with the drama on their cell phone. When children are placed in the sterile environment of the school system, these distractions are minimized because the child's surroundings are sterile, solely containing learning materials and peers who are trying to accomplish the same task. If a child were to attempt to learn at home, no matter what age they were, they would be surrounded with the temptations of play, and, even if they had the power to restrain, it would affect their ability to concentrate and retain information.  Continuing, the home simply does not stimulate the mind as completely as the school does.  In a school there are hundreds of resources at a child's fingertips: libraries full of books, teachers full of knowledge, materials full of the ability to educate. While the home may have educational resources, the vast amount does not compare to that of a traditional school.  Not only does a classroom have abundant learning materials and information, but it also has students who help each other grow and prosper in their learning environment. For hundreds of years, the traditional desk-and-chalkboard schooling system has been used, and over those years, people are still excelling and test scores are still rising. This is because the school stimulates the mind like nothing else; it allows children a place to let their curiosity wander and lead their education. To take away the school will take away the stimulation.  Finally, a common problem found in adults is an inability to separate home and work life; this begins at a young age when children fail to make the clear distinction between home and school.  By allowing students to participate in school from their home, it will make this distinction even less clear which will not only affect the child's present life but also his or her future life as a working adult. when there is no specific time and place for a child to learn, their home and education lives blend together, often affecting both for the worse. An example of this is seen in Tara Westover, the famous author of the memoir,

Educated.

Westover was home schooled but was often given little time to learn because of her home obligations. This caused her to lack education as well as the knowledge that home and school are two distinctly different things. If students were able to mix their home and school lives, the negative results of an inability to distinguish The Home and The School would far outweigh the positives.  Many may disagree with this position, saying that this opportunity, to learn in the comfort of ones own home, would greatly benefit those who suffer from illness or other challenges that prevent them from attending school.  However, the ratio of those who are unable to attend a traditional school to those who are is very small. Many students would take advantage of this "distance learning" opportunity and use it for an easier education rather than a better one. There are several types of accommodations one can receive for illness or any other obstacle that hinders their education; allowing any person, without such disabilities, to receive these accommodations endangers them and their education.  Although the idea of learning from home has been widely acknowledged, it has also been widely debated. There are several positives when one looks on the surface of this idea, however when one truly delves into the logistics of such a change, they will realize that there are too many negatives that accompany it. The home is too distracting and does not allow the proper stimulation for learning that a child needs to succeed in life; the lack of a distinguishable home and school life will also harm the child as he or she matures. If a change that is supposed to bring better and more accessible schooling to children in fact causes the opposite, this change will not benefit the education system.

La SpeziaNello Spezzino il nome «Calevo» è sinonimo di edilizia, una costante che è entrata anche nel gergo comune quasi ad indicare più un concetto commerciale che una singola azienda. Del resto la «ditta Calevo», come si diceva un tempo, è da oltre un secolo impegnata nel settore delle costruzioni e del commercio di prodotti per l'edilizia. Oggi la sua sede commerciale è nel territorio industriale di Arcola, dove produce prefabbricati e materiali per l'edilizia, vicino alla sponda del fiume Magra. Ma in zona ha anche molte altre proprietà e magazzini. Un'azienda leader che copre un po' tutto il settore, dai semplici materiali edili, ai serramenti, all'abbigliamento antinfortunistica, per arrivare alla produzione di lavorati. Ne ha fatta di strada la «ditta Calevo» da quando nel 1888 ha aperto come rivendita di legna e carbone. Un'azienda che è passata di padre in figlio per oltre un secolo, diventando una delle realtà più importanti della Liguria di Levante e della Lunigiana. Uno sviluppo iniziato nel 1964 quando nello stabilimento «Calevo Nestore & Figlio» si inizia a vendere la calce proveniente da una fornace di proprietà della famiglia. Poi nel 1974 si aprono nuovi settori e si avvia la commercializzazione di prodotti a tuttotondo per il settore edile

These days, before deeming them worthy of an acceptance letter, colleges take many aspects of a students life, into consideration. Many think colleges only look at grades and test scores, when that is not the case.

Although, grades and test scores are crucial to admission, they aren't the only thing colleges look at. Extracurricular activities are a great way to stand out to colleges. Many students shy away from participating in extracurricular activities because they aren't aware of the benefits.  Requiring students to participate in them would eliminate future grievances.  Leadership skills  passion, being well-rounded  Colleges absolutely love having notable alumni; which is why, they look for pupils with many examples of leadership.

Schools offer various opportunities to show off those skills.  One popular example is sports.

What says leadership better than being team captain?

Sports are also a common way to receive scholarships.

Last year, someone on the Riverside Baseball Team got into Princeton. It is very likely they got in because of their performance on the baseball team. He probably wouldn't have gotten into Princeton if he hadn't played baseball. The Riverside Baseball player is a key example of how extracurricular activities are beneficial to students. If one isn't athletic, sports are not the only option.

Being the president, treasurer, or even secretary, of a club are wonderful positions to show leadership.

My older sister was the treasurer of Humanity First in her junior year and the president in her senior year; she was accepted into Duke.

It is highly likely that if she wasn't president, or treasurer, she wouldn't have been admitted. Leadership skills are vital for college acceptance, and requiring extracurricular activities would help students showcase them.  Passionate people are sought out by colleges, and extracurricular activities are a great way to show passion. Passionate people are often very committed.  Colleges want active members of society in their schools, not people who sign up for activities to be able to say they were apart of them.

Colleges know when someone signs up for a club just because they think it'll look good for college. They want people to sign up for a club because they genuinely enjoy its purpose, and not because of what it'll look like on an application. Colleges want active club members; not club members who barely go to meetings. Participating in marching band for all four years shows commitment, passion, and loyalty. Colleges want those attributes, so they are assured their students won't leave them for another college, and if they decided their major, they will stick with it. Required extracurricular activities would help students find their passions, and they would no longer wander aimlessly in life. Extracurricular activities show colleges passion, and passion is rare among teenagers. Often, passionate people go on to do great things in the world, and colleges want to have notable alumni.

Contrary to popular belief, GPA and test scores aren't everything.

Sure, they are very helpful and important on transcripts, but there are other factors colleges look at as well. This could be linked to the fact that American colleges allow their students to change their majors. If a person is well-rounded, then it is more likely that if they change their major to something completely different, they will not fail.

Being an active member in extracurricular activities shows that the person is not just good at memorizing notes, but that they are also able to partake in deeper thinking. Colleges want people that can use all of their brain, and not just one side of it. If someone had a perfect SAT/ACT score, a 5.0 GPA, and no extracurricular activities, they would probably not be chosen over someone with an SAT score of 1539, a 4.35 GPA and multiple extracurricular activities.

Required extracurricular activities would stop the person with a perfect SAT/ACT score and a 5.0 GPA from losing their spot to someone academically inferior who had more extracurricular activities. In terms of roundness, colleges want circles, not triangles. Leadership skills, passion, and appearing well rounded would enhance anyone's chances of getting into college and receiving scholarships.

Scholarships mean spending less money on college, which helps those who are paying for college. In the end, the principle's decision to require extracurricular activity participation, was a good one.

Online and video conferencing classes can offer a lifeline to students who are unable to attend classes in person due to illness or disability. These tools can help provide a quality education to students who might otherwise miss out on critical opportunities that can help further their education. In comparison to traditional in-person classes, online and video conferencing classes offer several benefits that should not be overlooked. 

For many students, attending in-person classes may not be possible due to circumstances such as disability or illness. In such cases, online and video conferencing classes provide an effective solution for the student to access quality educational material. Not only does this provide access to a world of educational resources, but it also allows students to stay connected to instructors and peers in an online environment. This can result in improved engagement and understanding of the material, since students have the opportunity to discuss topics and ask questions without needing to physically be in the room with everyone else. Furthermore, these classes provide flexibility; students can log in and out of sessions whenever they are able, depending on their illness or disability. 

The same learning outcomes can be achieved through online and video conferencing classes as through traditional in-person classes. By replacing the physical classroom infrastructure with online tools such as virtual whiteboards, lecture videos, and online chat rooms, students can still be provided with the resources they need to learn effectively. For example, virtual whiteboards provide students with the ability to collaborate on projects or jot down notes and ideas in real-time as they would in an in-person class. Additionally, lecture videos provide a method of presenting material without the need of a physical instructor, allowing the material to be accessed at any time. 

In conclusion, online and video conferencing classes can provide a viable alternative to traditional in-person classes for students who may be unable to physically attend. Not only do they offer flexibility and convenience, they are also capable of providing the same learning outcomes as traditional classes. Thus, online and video conferencing classes should be seriously considered by any student who is unable to attend classes in person due to illness or disability.

Wikileaks, l'organizzazione nota per la pubblicazione di informazioni provenienti da fonti governative e corporate, ha affrontato una serie di sfide negli ultimi mesi. In particolare, Bank of America si è unita ad altre istituzioni finanziarie nel bloccare le donazioni a Wikileaks. Ciò potrebbe avere gravi implicazioni per il futuro dell'organizzazione. Wikileaks è stata fondata nell'ottobre 2006 dall'attivista australiano Julian Assange con lo scopo dichiarato "di rendere i governi più responsabili e trasparenti". L'obiettivo principale del sito web era quello di fornire una piattaforma sicura ai whistleblower per condividere segreti confidenziali senza timore di rappresaglie legali o politiche. Nel corso degli anni, Wikileaks ha pubblicato documenti che hanno rivelato pratiche non etiche in molte organizzazioni pubbliche e private, tra cui il Pentagono, la Casa Bianca e Google. Nell'ultimo anno, tuttavia, Wikileaks ha affrontato crescenti ostilità da parte delle autorità statunitensi. Nell'aprile 2019, gli Stati Uniti sono diventati la prima nazione al mondo a presentare accuse penali contro Wikileaks, accusando Assange di cospirazione nella presunta violazione della sicurezza informatica dell'esercito americano. Gli Stati Uniti stanno anche cercando l'estradizione di Assange dal Regno Unito, dove attualmente risiede sotto detenzione preventiva

The photo was taken from orbit around mars using a camera attached to one of Nasa's space shuttles.
It shows what appears to be a human-like face carved into the surface of rocks near the martian equator.  Scientists believe that these features were formed as water eroded away layers of sandstone over millions or even billions of years.   They also think this is evidence that there may have been liquid water flowing across the planet at some point during it's history. 
Scientists are not sure how long ago water flowed but they do know that conditions must have changed dramatically between then and now because we can no longer see any signs of water activity anywhere else on the planet today.  
There are many theories about who might have created such a feature.  

Some scientists speculate that aliens could have visited earth thousands or even millions of years ago and left their mark behind.    Others suggest that humans themselves could have done so when our ancestors first arrived here from another part of the solar system. 

Others still argue against both of those ideas claiming instead that the image is simply a natural geological feature which happened coincidentally to look like something made by intelligent beings....

Chaouki contro Salvini: "Pagherà la sua crudeltà" Chaouki, un rifugiato tunisino di 25 anni che ha vissuto in Italia per quasi due decenni, è determinato a far pagare al Ministro dell'Interno Matteo Salvini il suo trattamento crudele degli immigrati. Dopo essere stato arrestato e detenuto senza accuse da parte delle autorità italiane, Chaouki sta ora cercando giustizia attraverso le vie legali. Ha presentato una causa contro lo Stato italiano sostenendo che i suoi diritti umani sono stati violati durante l'arresto e la detenzione. La storia di Chaouki non è isolata; gli attivisti dei diritti umani hanno denunciato ripetutamente le politiche anti-immigrazione adottate dal governo di Salvini come discriminatorie ed estremiste. Nel corso del mandato di quattro anni di Salvini come ministro dell'interno, migliaia di richiedenti asilo e migranti sono rimasti bloccati nelle stazioni ferroviarie o nei campi profughi mentre aspettavano decisioni sulla loro situazione legale. Inoltre, centinaia di persone sono state espulse dalla nazione senza processo equo o accesso alle risorse necessarie per sopravvivere nel proprio paese d'origine

Verstärkte Erleichterung bei der Fanszene von Leverkusen. Nach einem nervenaufreibenden Spiel gegen Schalke 04 konnte Bayer 04 endlich wieder einmal zu Hause punkten. Ex-Nationalspieler Karim Bellarabi erzielte das entscheidende Tor in der 61. Minute und sicherte so den Heimspielsieg. Das lange Warten auf den nächsten Heimspielsieg konnte endlich beendet werden. Schließlich war auch das Schalker Torhüter-Duo Fährmann und Nübel nichts entgegenzusetzen. Bayer-Keeper Hradecky musste hingegen nur wenige Bälle halten.
Auch Borussia Dortmund konnte heute gegen den VfL Wolfsburg gewinnen. Nach einem spannenden 1:0 Spiel im ausverkauften Signal Iduna Park steht Borussia Dortmund nun wieder auf Platz 3 der Tabelle. Julian Weigl erzielte das entscheidende Tor in der 7. Minute gegen den VfL, damit konnte die Mannschaft von Lucien Favre ihren zweiten Heimsieg in Folge feiern. Auch wenn das Spiel nicht unbedingt das absolut beste Spiel des BVB in dieser Saison war und die Wolfsburger ebenfalls gute Chancen hatten, am Ende zählt nur das Ergebnis.
Für beide Teams heißt es in der kommenden Woche weiter dran bleiben. Leverkusen muss gegen Hannover unbedingt nachlegen, um sich weiter im oberen Tabellendrittel zu halten. Der BVB muss ebenfalls weiter punkten, um beim Kampf auf die Meisterschaft im Tabellenkampf dabei zu sein. Die nächsten Spiele entscheiden über die weitere Platzierung in der Tabelle. Die Fans können sich schon jetzt auf ein spannendes Spiel mit nervenziereißenden Momenten freuen.
Die Fans können zufrieden sein, denn heute haben zwei der besten deutschen Mannschaften zeigten, dass sie gut miteinander mithalten können und die Spiele streckenweise sehr spannend waren. Die Bundesliga ist und bleibt ein Wettbewerb auf höchstem Niveau, bei dem jederzeit mit Überraschungen gerechnet werden muss. Wir freuen uns auf weitere spannende Spiele in der Zukunft. Die deutsche Nationalmannschaft kann hieraus genauso wieder gestärkt hervorgehen wie aus Erfolgen unserer Vereine im europäischen Vereinsfußball. Denn die internationalen Erfolge beginnen auf nationaler Ebene.
Zusamenfassend haben heute die Fans von Leverkusen und Dortmund Grund zum Feiern. Beide Mannschaften konnten ihre Spiele gewinnen und damit ihre Chancen auf die Meisterschaft sowie die Platzierung in der Tabelle verbessern. Wir sind sehr gespannt auf die kommenden Spiele und freuen uns auf weitere spannende Begegnungen in der deutschen Bundesliga. Diese gehört zu den besten Ligen in Europa.
Keywords: Leverkusen, BVB, Meisterschaft, Tabelle, Signal Iduna Park, Fährmann, Nübel, Hradecky, Weigl, Freude, Fans, Hannover, Bundesliga, Chance, Überraschungen, Nationalmannschaft, europäischer Vereinsfußball, internationale Erfolge.<|im_end|>

Wenige Tage nach den Rebellen hat auch die ukrainische Armee nach eigenen Angaben den Abzug ihrer schweren Waffen entlang der Waffenstillstandslinie im Osten des Landes abgeschlossen und damit eine Kernforderung im Friedensprozess erfüllt. Am Samstag seien alle Mörser aus Piski und Opitne in der Nähe des monatelang umkämpften Flughafens von Donezk abgezogen worden, sagte ein Militärsprecher. Eine Bestätigung der Organisation für Sicherheit und Zusammenarbeit in Europa (OSZE) gab es zunächst nicht. Journalisten der Nachrichtenagentur AFP beobachteten am Samstag einen Militärkonvoi, der Mörser von Regierungsstellungen in Piski in Richtung eines Waffenlagers abtransportierte. Ein ukrainischer Soldat sagte gegenüber AFP, dass die Truppe nun nur noch über Gewehre, Kalaschnikows und Steine verfüge, um sich im Falle eines Angriffs zu verteidigen. Wir reagieren nicht auf Provokationen oder Schüsse der Rebellen, versicherte er. Dennoch warfen einander Regierungstruppen und prorussische Rebellen am Samstag gegenseitig vor, den Waffenstillstand in den vergangenen Tagen gebrochen zu haben. Nach Angaben Kiews wurden Regierungstruppen mit Gewehren, Granatwerfern und Mörsern beschossen. Vier Soldaten wurden demnach verletzt, als sie auf eine Landmine traten. Ein Rebellensprecher warf einem ukrainischen Freiwilligenbataillon vor, Donezk bombardiert zu haben. Die gegen Kiew kämpfenden Rebellen hatten am Donnerstag erklärt, ihre schweren Waffen von der Frontlinie in der Donezk-Region abgezogen zu haben. In der Nachbarregion Luhansk (Lugansk) hatten beide Seiten nach eigenen Angaben schon im Oktober den Abzug beendet. Die Konfliktparteien hatten sich Ende September verständigt, alle Panzer, Artilleriegeschütze von einem Kaliber unter 100 Millimeter und Mörser je 15 Kilometer hinter die Front zu verlegen. Der Waffenabzug ist ein Schlüsselelement des Minsker Friedensfahrplans vom Februar. Er soll zu einer 30 bis 40 Kilometer breiten Pufferzone führen, um das Aufflammen neuer Gewalt zu verhindern. Wichtigste nächste politische Etappe des Minsk-Prozesses sind Wahlen in den von den Rebellen ausgerufenen Volksrepubliken Donezk und Luhansk. Sie sollten eigentlich noch in diesem Jahr stattfinden, wurden aber inzwischen auf Anfang 2016 verschoben. Der deutsche Außenminister Frank-Walter Steinmeier (SPD) hatte am Freitag in Berlin mit seinen Amtskollegen aus Frankreich, Russland und der Ukraine über den Konflikt beraten. Danach zeigte er sich zuversichtlich, dass spätestens bis Anfang Dezember sämtliche schwere Waffen aus dem Kampfgebiet verschwunden sein könnten. Auch mit der Entfernung dort versteckter Minen solle vor dem Wintereinbruch begonnen werden.

The Electoral College is a fundamental aspect of the United States presidential election system, and its importance lies in its role in electing the president rather than reflecting the popular vote. Here's an argument in favor of the Electoral College:

Ensuring Electoral Diversity: The Electoral College promotes electoral diversity by distributing electoral votes to states based on their population and applying a minimum of three electoral votes to each state. This system ensures that smaller states have a voice in the election process, despite having fewer residents. It prevents candidates from solely focusing on densely populated areas and encourages them to appeal to a broader range of voters across the country.

Representing Rural Areas: The Electoral College recognizes that rural areas often have different political priorities than densely populated cities. By awarding electoral votes to states rather than solely based on the popular vote within each state, it provides rural communities with increased political influence. This is particularly important considering that rural areas often have lower population densities but cover a large geographic area, giving them a more significant presence in state politics.

Promoting Statewide Governance: The Electoral College reinforces the principle of statewide governance by awarding electoral votes to winning candidates based on their statewide popular vote. This encourages candidates to develop comprehensive campaign strategies that consider the diverse needs and preferences of all voters within a state, rather than solely focusing on winning the populous cities.

Despite these arguments in favor of the Electoral College, there are certainly arguments against it. One of the main criticisms is that it undermines the principle of "one person, one vote," as the election outcome can be determined by state-level voting distributions that may not reflect the national popular vote. Additionally, the possibility of vote splitting and the perception of electoral fraud have been raised as concerns. 

Ultimately, the debate around the importance of the Electoral College underscores the need for careful consideration of the advantages and disadvantages of our current electoral system. It is essential to ensure that the method of electing the president reflects the values and aspirations of the American people and promotes fair and accurate representation in our democracy. 

Would you like me to discuss arguments against the Electoral College and provide a counterargument to the points made above?

Today, the majority of humans own and operate cell phones on a daily basis. A growing body of research shows that driving while using a cellphone can create dangerous distractions. However, many states do not have bans against the use of phones while none have forbidden the use of hands-free devices. Opponents of the idea claim that cellphone bans are difficult to enforce while others claim that drivers also engage in other distracting activities such as eating, listening to music, and arguing with their children  Nevertheless, a review of the statistics indicates that cell phone use, even hands-free increases the likelihood of fatal incidents which provides justification for the bans.  Hundreds of research studies across the world have highlighted the various risks of cell phone use among drivers  Having conversations on a phone while driving increases the likelihood of fatal incidents by 400% (Walsh et al. 1896). Therefore, cell phone use creates more risk than other distractions such as reading billboards or having conversations with passengers. A study sponsored by the Harvard Center of Risk Analysis concluded that use of phones while driving contributed to 6% of crashes (Delgado et al. 17). Texting and driving also present a significant problem especially among the younger generations. Research shows that drivers using mobile phones decrease their visual scans of the road, have a higher probability of weaving in their lanes on bends, and have slower reactions to hazards due to having one hand off the wheel. 
The act of conversation itself also creates a distraction. While focusing on the road requires a certain amount of cognitive processing, the complexity of conversations also engages cognitive resources  MRIs indicate that during driving, people exhibit extensive stimulation in the parietal lobe of the brain mainly associated with spatial processing. However, when performing dual tasks, such as having a conversation, activity in the temporal lobes rises significantly signifying processing of auditory stimuli (Fitch et al. 712). The rise in temporal lobe activity corresponds to a large reduction in parietal-lobe activation which indicates that conversations require more attention which is diverted away from the driving task. If a driver chooses to prioritize a conversation, then it reduces their focus on the road, thereby increasing the likelihood of a crash  While some may argue that the use of hands-free devices reduces the risk of a crash  research provides contradictory results. A study on the cognitive effects of talking on cellphones concluded that while participants often crashed while chatting, drunk drivers had reduced likelihood of a crash (Lipovac et al. 136).  Current legislation on cell phone use while driving is limited as legislators do not acknowledge the risks of both hand-held and hands-free cell phones  Moreover, opponents of the motion claim that such laws are unenforceable due to the resources required to monitor all drivers. However, a review of a person's billing records can determine whether they were using a phone while driving. Moreover, aggressive enforcement may also deter other drivers from risky activities.  Despite the risks associated with cell phone use while driving, most states remain hesitant to implement appropriate bans. Statistics indicate that cell phone use accounts for a significant portion of car crashes due to the limited focus on the road. Bans would work to increase awareness of the dangers in addition to reducing fatal incidences.

بعد 83 عاما من وفاته في 27 ديسمبر/كانون الأول 1936 لا يزال الشاعر التركي محمد
عاكف أرصوي، مؤلف النشيد الوطني لبلاده رمزا فكريا وأدبيا حيا في العالم الإسلامي
الذي تنقل فيه بين تركيا العثمانية والجمهورية، والبلقان وسوريا ومصر التي عاش
فيها أكثر من عشر سنوات، بالإضافة للبنان والجزيرة العربية. وأصبح أرصوي واحدا من
أكثر الشخصيات شهرة في الأدب التركي أوائل القرن العشرين، حسبما يؤكد نجم الدين
توريناي الخبير في أعمال أرصوي الأدبية، والأستاذ في جامعة الاقتصاد والتكنولوجيا
بالعاصمة أنقرة. وتحدث توريناي -الذي يعمل حاليا على النسخة الأحدث من ديوانه
الأول "صفحات"، لوكالة الأناضول- عن ديوان الشاعر المكون من 44 قصيدة وعمل أدبي،
بينها قصيدة المراحل (1911) ومحاضرة في السليمانية (1912) وأصوات الحق (1913)
ومحاضرة في الفاتح (1914) ومذكرات (1917) وعاصم (1924) والظلال (1933). وتناولت
قصائد أرصوي المشكلات الاجتماعية، والقضايا الفلسفية والدينية، والسياسية
والأخلاقية. وجاءت في سبعة دواوين شعرية، وبرزت مواهبه الشعرية في غضون الحرب
العالمية الأولى وألهب مشاعر الأتراك بقصائد دعا فيها للوحدة الإسلامية. ويقع
منزل أرصوي -الذي أجريت فيه المقابلة- في "ألتينداغ" أحد أقدم أحياء أنقرة،
وانتقل إليه قادما من إسطنبول في عشرينيات القرن الماضي. الزعيم الروحيقال
توريناي إن أرصوي انتقل إلى أنقرة خلال أكثر سنوات الاحتلال الأجنبي صعوبة في
البلاد. وأضاف أنه عندما جاء أرصوي إلى أنقرة، كان على الشعب أن يحقق شيئين
أساسيين للفوز بحرب الاستقلال، الأول تشكيل جيش جديد إثر حل الجيوش التركية بموجب
اتفاقيات الحرب العالمية الأولى، والثاني تشجيع الناس على الانضمام إلى النضال
الوطني أملا في الاستقلال. وخلال خطبه في مختلف مساجد مدن الأناضول، ألهب أرصوي
مشاعر الإيمان والروح اللازمة للنضال الوطني. عام 1920، تم انتخاب أرصوي أيضا
نائبا في البرلمان عن مقاطعة "بوردور" شمال غربي البلاد. النشيد الوطنيكتب أرصوي
النشيد الوطني المعروف باسم "مارش الاستقلال" في منزله بأنقرة، والذي كان يسكنه
من قبله رجال صوفيون (دراويش). وأعلنت قصيدة "مارش الاستقلال" لأرصوي رسميا نشيدا
وطنيا من قبل الجمعية الوطنية التركية الكبرى في 12 مارس/آذار 1921. وفي نشيد
الاستقلال، خلد أرصوي معركة أمته من أجل البقاء، في أعقاب الحرب الكونية الأولى،
والتي توجت بالتحرير عام 1921 إثر حرب الاستقلال ضد الاحتلال الأجنبي. وبعد الحرب
العالمية الأولى، انهارت الإمبراطورية العثمانية على يد القوات البريطانية
والفرنسية، وخلال خطاب مشهور ألقاه في مسجد بمنطقة كاستامونو شمال الأناضول، أدان
معاهدة سيفر داعيا الناس إلى استخدام عقيدتهم وأسلحتهم لمحاربة المستعمرين
الغربيين، وانتشر خطابه في أنحاء البلاد وجرى توزيعه على الجنود. وفي ظل هذه
الظروف، استهل أرصوي "نشيد الاستقلال" بكلمة "لا تخف" وقال توريناي إن الشاعر بدأ
قصيدته بدعوة لإعطاء الأمل للشعب التركي والإسلامي ضد الاحتلال الأجنبي حتى
يتمكنوا من استعادة استقلالهم. وبالحديث عن مقاطع ذلك النشيد، أوضح توريناي أنه
من خلال الكلمات الخاصة بالنشيد، حذر أرصوي الشعب من أن الظروف السلبية كانت
مؤقتة وحثه على الكفاح والتغلب على القيود. وأكد توريناي أن نشيد الاستقلال سرعان
ما بدأ يثير تداعيات كبيرة في العالمين الإسلامي والتركي، في أعقاب اعتراف
البرلمان به رسميا نشيدا وطنيا. كما شدد على أن أرصوي -الذي عبر في أعماله عن
أكثر الأعوام إيلاما في تركيا خلال الحرب الكونية الأولى وحروب البلقان- اكتسب
سمعة طيبة داخل الإمبراطورية العثمانية وخارجها. وأضاف: كان شاعرا ومؤلفا معروفا
في مجموعة واسعة من البلدان التي تمتد من أذربيجان وباكستان والهند إلى مصر
وسوريا والعراق وشمال أفريقيا ومن شبه جزيرة القرم إلى البلقان. كما أشار توريناي
إلى أن فهم أرصوي للشعر لم يقتصر على حدود تركيا الوطنية، بل امتد خطابه إلى
العالم الإسلامي بأسره. مرآة التاريخوصف توريناي أرصوي بأنه أحد عباقرة الشعر
التركي، وأضاف أنه إذا كان هناك وعي في تركيا اليوم بالحرب العالمية الأولى
ومعركة جناق قلعة (جاليبولي) فهذا بفضل قصيدة أرصوي لشهداء هذه المعركة، كما
يتذكر الشعب ألم وحزن ودمار هذه السنوات من خلال تلك القصيدة. وأوضح أن أرصوي لا
يروي فقط ألم وذكريات شهداء جاليبولي في القصيدة، ولكنه يصف أيضا انسحاب
إمبراطورية من مرحلة التاريخ ونهاية حقبة بأكملها. وكانت معركة جناق قلعة -التي
وقعت في مقاطعة تحمل الاسم ذاته، شمال غربي تركيا عام 1915- بمثابة تحول لصالح
الأتراك ضد قوات الحلفاء خلال الحرب الكونية الأولى. حياة حافلةولد أرصوي لأب
تركي وأم بخارية، وتعلم العربية على يد والده المدرس وحفظ القرآن صغيرا، وعمل
مفتشا بوزارة الزراعة بعد دراسة الطب البيطري، ودرس كذلك الفرنسية والفارسية.
ورغم أنه فارق جمعية الاتحاد والترقي، فقد اعتمد البرلمان قصيدته "نشيد
الاستقلال" كنشيد رسمي للبلاد في 12 مارس/آذار سنة 1921. ونشر مقالاته في مجلته
"الصراط المستقيم" التي تغير اسمها لتصبح "سبيل الرشاد" وانتقد الأفكار القومية
في بعض مقالاته وكتب "أنتم فقط عبارة عن أفراد في أمة واحدة هي الأمة الإسلامية،
وكلما حافظتم على الإسلامية لم تفقدوا قومياتكم". وتسجل قصائده ومقالاته العديد
من محطات حياته، فكتب قصيدة "من صحراء نجد إلى المدينة المنورة" سنة 1914 متحدثا
عن رحلته للمدينة. وصُدم أرصوي من إلغاء السلطنة والخلافة العثمانية، فهاجر إلى
مصر عام 1925 بدعوة من صديقه الأمير عباس حليم باشا، وهناك قضى عشر سنوات في غربة
قاسية عانى فيها صعوبة الحياة. وترجم هناك معاني القرآن الكريم لكنه رفض نشرها،
واعتنى بمقالات لجمال الدين الأفغاني والشيخ محمد عبده والمفكر محمد فريد وجدي،
قبل أن يذهب للبنان ومنها لإسطنبول التي توفي فيها.

Barack Obama, il senatore junior dell'Illinois e candidato presidenziale democratico per le elezioni del 2008 negli Stati Uniti d'America, ha ottenuto una vittoria schiacciante nelle primarie della Carolina del Sud. Ha vinto con un margine di oltre due a uno rispetto alla sua avversaria più vicina, la Senatrice Hillary Clinton dello Stato di New York. Questa è stata la seconda grande vittoria consecutiva di Obama dopo aver vinto in Iowa poche settimane fa. La notizia che Obama aveva tagliato il traguardo nella Carolina del Sud è arrivata come una sorpresa per molti osservatori politici che avevano previsto che Clinton sarebbe emersa vittoriosa dallo stato conservatore del sud. Invece, i risultati hanno mostrato che Obama era ampiamente popolare sia tra gli afroamericani che rappresentano quasi metà degli iscritti al voto democratico nello stato, che tra i bianchi moderati e progressisti. Ciò potrebbe essere attribuito alle sue convincenti esibizioni nei recenti dibattiti televisivi o all'entusiasmo crescente intorno alla sua campagna. Nonostante ciò, non c'è dubbio sul fatto che l'enorme successo di Obama nella Carolina del Sud lo abbia reso il favorito delle primarie democratiche nazionali

Participating in extracurricular activities carries numerous benefits that contribute to personal growth and development. One of the main advantages is that it helps prevent laziness. By engaging in activities that require dedication and commitment, students learn the importance of discipline and hard work. This prevents them from developing habits of idleness, which can lead to procrastination and unproductivity. Instead, they acquire valuable time management skills by juggling multiple commitments, enabling them to strike a balance between school and extracurricular pursuits. 

Additionally, extracurricular activities bring happiness to attending school. Through participation in activities they enjoy, students develop a positive association with learning. For instance, my personal experience as a avid dancer instilled in me a passion for movement and expression. This enthusiasm translated to my academic pursuits, as I began to see connections between different subjects and became eager to learn more. Extracurricular activities also provide a healthy outlet for students to release their creative energies or channel their competitive spirit, reducing stress and fostering a happier mindset. 

Furthermore, extracurricular activities significantly improve social skills. They offer opportunities for students to interact with individuals outside their immediate peer group, helping them develop interpersonal skills and learn to collaborate with people from diverse backgrounds. Through team sports or group projects in extracurricular clubs, students enhance their communication skills, empathy, and conflict resolution abilities. Moreover, extracurricular activities provide chances for students to step into leadership roles, fostering the development of vital leadership skills and boosting their confidence. 

In conclusion, extracurricular activities play a pivotal role in shaping well-rounded individuals. They keep students engaged and motivated, fostering a love for learning and personal growth. Beyond academic benefits, these activities cultivate social skills and empathy, preparing students for the challenges and opportunities of the real world. By promoting extracurricular activities, we empower students to lead fulfilling and successful lives. 

Would you like me to expand on any of the points or add additional information to this essay?

I believe that performing community service is important for middle school students for a number of reasons. On the benefit side, performing community service helps students learn about empathy and give back to their community. Studies have shown that helping others in need furthers individuals' sense of belonging and fosters feelings of solidarity. Additionally, the earned service credits toward graduation can be used to meet other requirements, such as requirements for certain advanced classes, as well as college and career requirements. On the downside, though, not all students have the time or inclination to perform community service or earn service credits. Additionally, given that the middle school years are formative years for personal identity development, kids start to form affiliations and develop loyalties to groups, which disables them from performing service for more than one group. In either case, the process moves at a glacial pace and does not motivate students. Worse yet, they drop out of the system. Therefore, it is necessary to create a structured and efficient system for performing community service. My recommendations are as follows: (1) Create an efficient website which creates a community for middle school students to register for available service opportunities; (2) Offer students incentives, such as complimentary school supplies or school uniforms, to students who perform a certain amount of hours of community service (e.g., 1,500). This problem statement has several dimensions, and my response would have to consider all of them. I would start by discussing the importance of performing community service for students. This includes giving them the opportunity to practice empathy and show that they feel a sense of belonging to their community. In this way, they also learn that helping others can foster solidarity between people and nations. I would then highlight the importance of using earned service credits to advance in school, such as required credits for certain classes or college applications. Additionally, I would emphasize the need to provide effective and motivating support systems to make community service a more attractive proposition for students. Finally, I would emphasize that it is vital to help students foster personal identity by enabling them to form affiliations and loyalties to groups while enabling them to perform service to more than one group. In conclusion, I would stress the importance of designing an efficient service platform that is easy to use by students to register for available community service opportunities. I would provide incentives, such as complimentary school supplies or school uniforms, for students who perform a certain amount of hours of community service.

The potential benefits of a policy requiring students to earn their extra curricular activities through excellence in academics are numerous. For one, it puts an emphasis on the importance of doing well in school. It ties success in the world outside the classroom to success in the classroom, which can go a long way in inspiring students to strive for higher grades. A policy of this kind could also help to create a healthier academic environment – one that promotes learning and encourages hard work instead of a competition for tangible rewards, like letters or trophies.

In addition to promoting strong academic performance, this policy could also help to prepare students for the future. By imposing a set of standards that students must meet in order to participate in extra curricular activities, it gives them an added incentive to plan ahead and put greater focus on their studies. It encourages students to develop long-term goals and plan their learning accordingly, enabling them to better master certain topics in advance rather than when the time to act comes. This can help pre-empt any last minute cramming, thus reducing the amount of stress usually associated with preparing for tests and exams.

Furthermore, this policy could also motivate students to strive harder in their studies, as they're incentivized to pursue academic excellence in order to better their chances of participating in activities they're passionate about. It instills in them the importance of hard work, perseverance, and dedication, all of which are essential skills that will serve them well later on in life. 

In conclusion, a policy that requires students to earn their extra curricular activities through maintaining good grades could benefit them in many ways. It could reduce stress, increase motivation to strive for higher grades, and better prepare them for their future. It's clear, then, that such a policy could bring about significant, lasting changes in students' academic pursuits and ultimately equip them for success in the years to come.

Auf der französischen Teststrecke des neuen TGV-Hochgeschwindigkeitszugs entgleiste ein Zug am Montag mit enormer Wucht. Die genaue Ursache der Tragödie wurde noch nicht ermittelt, doch es wird vermutet, dass es sich um einen technischen Fehler handelt. Bei dem Unfall wurden mindestens elf Menschen getötet und weitere sechs schwer verletzt.
Der TGV - Train à Grande Vitesse - sollte eigentlich schon im nächsten Jahr den Betrieb aufnehmen. Er gilt als einer der modernsten und schnellsten Züge der Welt. Doch bei der Testfahrt am Montag geriet er außer Kontrolle und krachte mit hoher Geschwindigkeit gegen eine Betonmauer. Dabei entgleisten sechs Waggons des Zugs.
Die Ursache des Unglücks ist derzeit noch unklar, aber eine technisches Problem scheint naheliegend. Es wird vermutet, dass es sich um eine fehlerhafte Bremse handelte, die den Zug nicht mehr rechtzeitig zum Stehen brachte. Bei dem Unfall kamen elf Insassen ums Leben, darunter auch der Lokführer. Weitere sechs Menschen wurden schwer verletzt und mussten ins Krankenhaus gebracht werden.
Die TGV-Strecke, auf der der Unfall passierte, ist eine Teststrecke in der Nähe von Straßburg. Sie wurde extra für den neuen TGV gebaut und sollte seine Fähigkeiten vor der offiziellen Inbetriebnahme im nächsten Jahr demonstrieren. Doch statt einer erfolgreichen Probefahrt gab es nun eine schreckliche Katastrophe.
Die Untersuchungen zum Unfall dauern derzeit noch an, doch die französische Regierung hat bereits angekündigt, dass Konsequenzen gezogen werden, falls sich herausstellen sollte, dass das Unglück auf einen Fehler bei Konstruktion oder Bau des Zugs zurückzuführen ist. Eine offizielle Stellungnahme der TGV-Entwickler steht bisher noch aus.
Der hohe Preis für das TGV-Projekt und die lange Entwicklungszeit haben die Erwartungen an den Hochgeschwindigkeitszug sehr hochgeschraubt. Doch der Unfall bei der Testfahrt hat diese optimistischen Prognosen nun erschüttert. Ob der TGV jemals wie geplant auf den Schienen rollen wird, bleibt abzuwarten. Eines steht allerdings fest: Die heute gestorbenen Menschen werden eine Mahnung bleiben, dass in der Technik alle Vorsicht geboten sein muss. Insbesondere dort, wo Menschenleben auf dem Spiel stehen.

E’ arrivato dalla Francia con un carico di 70 ovuli di eroina e cocaina nascosti nella pancia. Il 24enne nigeriano non è passato inosservato agli uomini della Polfer in servizio alla stazione di Porta Garibaldi a Milano. L’uomo è stato infatti bloccato e arrestato per traffico di sostanze stupefacenti. Il nigeriano era appena sceso da un treno proveniente dalla Francia e stava guadagnando l’uscita dalla stazione. Quando ha visto gli agenti aggirarsi tra i binari per i soliti controlli di routine, ha cercato maldestramente di confondersi con gli altri passeggeri. Questo atteggiamento ha insospettito i controlli che hanno deciso di fermare l’uomo. Sarebbe probabilmente stato rilasciato a breve se non si fosse mostrato agitato e molto nervoso . A questo punto anche i suoi bagagli sono stati perquisiti e alcune scarpe sono state trovate tagliate proprio in prossimità della suola, quasi per farne un contenitore. Probabilmente di sostanze illegali. E' stato quindi chiamato il pubblico ministero di turno che ha autorizzato gli agenti a portare il 24enne all’ospedale Niguarda per ulteriori controlli. Gli esami effettuati hanno confermato i sospetti della Polfer. Si trattava infatti di un trafficante che aveva ingerito 70 ovuli di droga, per un totale di 800 grammi tra eroina e cocaina

Ein Artikel darüber, welche Fragen in der Wissenschaft aufgetaucht sind, seit man beobachtet hat, dass Schimpansen in der Lage sind, abstrakte und komplexe Denkaufgaben zu lösen.
Schimpansen zählen nicht nur zu den intelligentesten Tieren, sondern auch zu den Schwesterarten des Menschen. Sie können bestimmte Werkzeuge benutzen, um ihre Nahrung zu erhalten, aber ansonsten waren ihre kognitiven Fähigkeiten lange Zeit ein Rätsel. Das hat sich in den letzten Jahren stark verändert. Immer mehr Forschungsergebnisse zeigen, dass Schimpansen in der Lage sind, abstrakte und komplexe Denkaufgaben zu lösen. So können sie beispielsweise Pläne für künftige Handlungen oder Szenarien formulieren und sie nutzen Instrumente wie Tasten, um selbst gebaute Werkzeuge zu nutzen.
Wissenschaftler sind sich jedoch noch nicht gänzlich einig darüber, wie Schimpansen diese Denkprozesse vollziehen. Einige haben angedeutet, dass sie sie durch ein bewusstes Nachdenken und Reflektieren erreichen. Andere finden jedoch, dass die Schimpansen diese Fähigkeiten auf eine Art zeigen, die mehr einer schnellen Reaktion, als einem bewussten Denken entspricht.
Es besteht auch kein Zweifel, dass Schimpansen über ein sehr detailliertes Gedächtnis verfügen. Sie sind in der Lage, von einer großen Anzahl an Ereignissen ein inhaltliches Bild zu bewahren, einen positiven oder negativen emotionalen Inhalt zu erkennen, aufzunehmen und Informationen zu erinnern, die für zukünftige Aufgaben hilfreich sein könnten.
Ein weit verbreitetes Beispiel von Schimpansen, die abstrakte Denkaufgaben lösen, wurde erstmals von Tetsuro Matsuzawa von der Kyoto Universität beschrieben. In einem Experiment waren zwei Schimpansen in der Lage, sich spontan an die Reihenfolge von Zahlen aus einem Computerbildschirm zu erinnern und sie innerhalb von Millisekunden zu präsentieren, wenn die Zahlen auf dem Bildschirm erschienen. Dies verdeutlichte die Fähigkeit von Schimpansen, Zahlen in kurzer Zeit zu erfassen und sich daraus ergebende Zusammenhänge zu entdecken.
Forscher haben auch gezeigt, dass Schimpansen Geometrie und Fortbewegung verstehen können, indem sie geometrische Muster auf dem Boden nutzen, um von einer Stelle zur anderen zu gelangen. Diese Fähigkeit zeigt, wie Schimpansen Raum und Entfernung verstehen können.
Letztendlich ist es faszinierend, dass Schimpansen auf eine so unterschiedliche Weise als uns Menschen denken können. Sie zeigen sowohl ein einzigartiges kognitives Verhalten als auch ein einzigartiges soziales Verhalten, das für das Verständnis von uns und von ihnen entscheidend sein kann. So hat sich die Forschung über Schimpansen auf immer vielfältigere Art und Weise entwickelt, um die Ratsel zu lösen, die ihre kognitiven Fähigkeiten stellen.

Today, the majority of humans use their cell phones on a daily basis. Over the years humans have developed new ways to communicate with others in throughout their lives. As the years progress technology has been a part of our lives and we cannot "function" without it. We have adapted to technology so much we use it in our everyday. But technology does not always make a positive impact on our lives. We just need to know how to use it.  We use our phones so much it's beginning to be too much. We use it when we walk, eat, etc. But most dangerously when we are driving. Our phones cause a big distraction that we do not pay attention to anything we do  Using our phones while we drive can lead to small, big, or even fatal accidents. Not just on the driver, but also anyone who is nearby. According to Edgar Snyder, approximately 660,000 drivers attempt to use their phones while behind the wheel. In fact, using our phones and driving is the leading cause of death for teenagers today. Nearly 390,000 injuries occur every year because of accidents caused by using our phones and driving.  After numerous accidents and injuries, most teenagers are pledging not to text and drive.  The percentage of injuries involving the subject has dropped and is still dropping. Teenagers and other people have been spreading awareness to prevent any more car injuries involving phones. Technology will always be a part of our lives and will continue to become more advanced, but society needs to learn to use it responsibly.

I cittadini italiani che hanno oltre cinquant'anni sono più di 24,5 milioni . Tra questi soltanto uno su quattro - crica 6,7 milioni di persone, distribuiti tra circa 4 milioni di uomini e 2,6 di donne - hanno un lavoro . I dati vengono dal Centro Studi Investimenti Sociali (Censis) , che fa notare come tra il 2008 e il 2013 si sia visto un aumento dell'incidenza di lavoratori dipendenti e occupati a tempo pieno sul segmento, a causa dello spostamento in avanti dell'età pensionabile. Nello stesso periodo un aumento del 7,6% dei lavoratori autonomi e un numero doppio di occupati a tempo parziale: circa un milione nel 2013, in aumento del 47,5% rispetto ai sei anni passati. Sono 438mila i disoccupati over 50, 261mila in più rispetto al 2008, a indicare in termini relativi un amento del 146%. Quasi triplicati negli ultimi sei anni i disoccupati di lunga durata ultracinquantenni: da 93mila persone a 269mila (+189%). Fattori come l'insicurezza economica e l'erosione dei redditi spingono sempre più over 50 a cercare di entrare nel mercato del lavoro. Considerando chi cerca un'occupazione e chi si dichiara disponibile a lavorare, la pressione supera il milione di individui

Dass Inhaltsstoffe von Meeresalgen pharmazeutisch genutzt werden oder auch in der Kosmetikindustrie in Cremes und Lotionen Anwendung finden, ist mittlerweile ein alter Hut. Weit weniger bekannt ist hingegen, dass Algen auch fern von Meer und Wasser, nämlich in alpinen und hochalpinen Böden, vorkommen können. Gleich ihren marinen Verwandten enthalten auch diese Arten pharmakologisch interessante Wirkstoffe. Die Biotechnologin Bettina Rainer vom Management Center Innsbruck (MCI) widmet sich im Rahmen ihrer Doktorarbeit der Erforschung diesen Algen aus den Tiroler und Schweizer Alpen. Irgendwann war es für die Vorfahren der Bodenalgen, die auch als Landgänger bezeichnet werden, wohl vorteilhaft, das Wasser zu verlassen, sagt Rainer. Heute sind an die hundert Arten von Algen bekannt, die sowohl im als auch auf dem Boden leben können. Durch spezielle Schutzmechanismen können die Algen extremste Bedingungen wie Kälte, Trockenheit und UV Strahlung ertragen. Ein Teil dieser Anpassungen resultiert in der Ausbildung von speziellen Stoffwechselprodukten, die auch für uns Menschen interessant sind. Dazu gehören antibiotisch, antioxidativ oder auch entzündungshemmend wirksame Substanzklassen, die in der Pharma- und Kosmetikindustrie eingesetzt werden, sowie Carotinoide, die in der Nahrungsmittelindustrie Verwendung finden. Eine große Herausforderung ist laut Rainer die Kultivierung der Algen, da viele langsam wachsen und oft besondere Kultivierungsbedingungen verlangen. Manche Algen würden – äußerst ungewöhnlich für Pflanzen – sogar im Dunkeln wachsen, da sie in der Lage sind, gewisse Zucker zu verwerten. Hier macht sich bemerkbar, dass es weltweit erst sehr wenig Daten über Bodenalgen gibt – für jede Art müssen die optimalen Wachstumsbedingungen erst in langwierigen Experimenten erarbeitet werden. Gelingt diese Wachstumsoptimierung, kann genug Algenbiomasse generiert werden, aus der in weiteren Arbeitsschritten Wirkstoffe identifiziert und extrahiert werden können. Die Techniken, die dabei zum Einsatz kommen, reichen von Dünnschichtchromatografie über standardisierte Bioaktivitätsassays bis zu Kernspinresonanzspektroskopie. Bei der Suche nach Wirkstoffen lässt sich Rainer auch von anderen Pflanzen inspirieren: Wenn eine Substanzklasse in manchen Pflanzen eine bestimmte Wirkung hat, dann ist es gut möglich, dass das auch bei Algen der Fall ist. Speziell bei Bodenalgen werden aber öfter auch völlig neue Substanzen entdeckt, die erst genauer aufgeschlüsselt werden müssen. Die Fragen, warum und wie etwas wirkt, haben die 31-jährige gebürtige Pinzgauerin schon während ihres früheren Berufs  als pharmazeutisch-kaufmännische Assistentin interessiert und schließlich dazu bewogen, den gelernten Beruf an den Nagel zu hängen und Biotechnologie zu studieren. Gerade das Nichtgreifbare hat schon immer einen großen Reiz für mich gehabt. Ihre Zukunft sieht sie auch nach Abschluss ihrer Dissertation im Bereich Forschung und Entwicklung, aber auch in der Lehre: Der Kontakt mit jungen motivierten Leuten macht mir Spaß, und ich bin froh, in einem Institut zu arbeiten, in dem Forschung und Lehre gut kombiniert werden können.

قال الرئيس الروسي فلاديمير بوتين إنه يأمل في أن تتوقف الأعمال القتالية بليبيا
منتصف هذه الليلة استجابة للدعوة الروسية والتركية، فيما تحدث قيادي عسكري تابع
لحكومة الوفاق الوطني الليبية عن انسحاب جزئي لمرتزقة شركة فاغنر الروسية من
محورين للقتال في طرابلس. وصرح الرئيس الروسي -في مؤتمر صحفي عقب مباحثات اليوم
بموسكو مع المستشارة الألمانية أنجيلا ميركل- بأن الوقت حان لعقد محادثات السلام
بشأن ليبيا في برلين، مشيرا إلى أن الأعمال القتالية في ليبيا تؤثر سلبا على
الإقليم، ولها تداعيات أخرى على دول أوروبا. وفي إشارة غير مباشرة لوجود مرتزقة
روس يقاتلون إلى جانب اللواء المتقاعد خليفة حفتر، قال بوتين في المؤتمر الصحفي
"هناك مواطنون روس في ليبيا لكنهم لا يمثلون الدولة الروسية، ولا يتقاضون أي
أموال من حكومتها". من جانبها، قالت ميركل إنها تأمل في أن تنجح جهود موسكو
لتأمين هدنة بين الأطراف المتحاربة في ليبيا، مشددة على أن بلادها "تحاول عقد
مؤتمر دولي في برلين بشأن الأزمة الليبية"، ومن المنتظر أن يعقد المؤتمر في آخر
الشهر الجاري. بوتين وميركل تحدثا اليوم بشأن جهود وقف القتال في ليبيا ودفع
أطراف الصراع إلى طاولة الحوار (الأناضول) بوتين وأردوغانوكان الرئيسان التركي
رجب طيب أردوغان والروسي فلاديمير بوتين قد دعيا الأربعاء الماضي، في بيان مشترك
عقب اجتماعهما بإسطنبول، إلى وقف لإطلاق النار في ليبيا يبدأ منتصف الليلة، وقد
رحب المجلس الرئاسي لحكومة الوفاق المعترف بها دوليا ترحيبه بالدعوة، فيما رفضت
قوات خليفة حفتر هذه الدعوة وأعلنت عزمها الاستمرار في العملية العسكرية. وتشن
قوات حفتر هجوما واسعا على العاصمة الليبية طرابلس منذ أوائل أبريل/نيسان الماضي
بهدف بسط السيطرة عليها، وقد تمكنت قوات الوفاق من صد هذا الهجوم. وفي سياق متصل،
قال وزير الخارجية التركي مولود جاويش أوغلو إن على روسيا إقناع حفتر بوقف إطلاق
النار، كما أقنعت تركيا الحكومة الشرعية الليبية برئاسة فايز السراج بوقف إطلاق
النار. وأوضح وزير الخارجية التركي -في مؤتمر صحفي عقده بأنقرة- أن حفتر طرف في
الأزمة بليبيا، ولكنه لا يمتلك أية شرعية، وأن الطرف الشرعي في ليبيا هو حكومة
السراج، ولذا تقوم تركيا بالتواصل والتعامل معها. 6117730180001

الدراسةوبسبب الاشتباكات والقصف العشوائي، أعلنت "بلدية طرابلس المركز" اليوم
تعليق الدراسة لمدة أسبوع حفاظا على سلامة الطلبة والمعلمين. وقد أدت هجمات قوات
حفتر إلى حرمان عشرات آلاف الأطفال من التعليم، إذ ذكر بيان صادر الاثنين الماضي
عن صندوق الأمم المتحدة لرعاية الطفولة (يونيسيف) أن 115 ألف طفل حرموا من
التعليم جراء التصعيد الأخير للقتال في طرابلس، وأن خمس مدارس دمرت وأغلقت 210
أخرى أبوابها.

"Life", uscito nelle nostre sale questa settimana, racconta il breve periodo d'amicizia tra James Dean e il fotografo Dennis Stock, nonché la genesi di alcune immagini dell'attore divenute iconiche per generazioni. A impersonare il divo hollywoodiano prima che divenisse tale, c'è il giovane Dane DeHaan che ha forse la faccia un po' troppo da bambino per il ruolo, ma la cui aderenza al personaggio fa sì che la sua performance, dal punto di vista tecnico, rasenti la perfezione. Anche se il vero James Dean aveva un carisma che resta inarrivabile, DeHaan, come si può ascoltare nella versione originale del film, riesce, addirittura, a riprodurne l'esatto tono di voce cantilenante, compiendo un piccolo capolavoro. L'attore è in grado di rendere credibili le contraddizioni di un uomo che era davvero diverso da tutti gli altri: dallo sfoggio di un abbigliamento a metà tra il campagnolo e il metropolitano, fino alla dolorosa dicotomia interiore tra ambizione professionale e rigetto per lo star system. Un'anima timida, che si sentiva a casa nelle poesie di James Whitcomb Riley e capiva di essere troppo fragile per reggere l'agognata fama. Nei panni del fotografo coprotagonista, Robert Pattinson brilla per sobrietà e bravura, dimostrando di continuare a scegliere ruoli non facili per rimettersi in gioco dopo il fenomeno "Twilight"

The Electoral College has been in place since 1787 when it was created by Congress as part of Article II Section 1 Clause 2 of the United States Constitution.  The purpose behind its creation is that each state would have an equal say over who will become President.   However, there are many problems associated with the Electoral College system such as:  First, the Electoral College does not represent all Americans because only voters from 50 states plus Washington D.C., can cast their ballots during presidential elections.    Second, the Electoral College gives too much power into the hands of politicians rather than allowing people to vote directly for whom they want to run our country.   Thirdly, the Electoral College allows candidates like Donald Trump to win despite receiving fewer votes nationwide compared to his opponent Hillary Clinton (Trump received 306 Electoral College Votes while Clinton got 232).   Fourthly,  if you live outside of one of these fifty states then you cannot vote at all even though you may pay taxes just like someone living inside those states.   Fifthly,   the Electoral College makes it very difficult for third party candidates to get elected which means we do not hear about them until after the general...

تشتهر مدينة عمان، عاصمة المملكة الأردنية الهاشمية، بتراثها الثقافي والتاريخي العريق. ومن بين العديد من المعالم التي تروج لهذا التراث، تأتي أدراج عمان القديمة على رأس القائمة. فهذه الأدراج المنتشرة في العديد من الأماكن بالمدينة تحكي ذكريات الناس الذين استخدموها والقاطنين على مقربة منها، وتعكس تاريخهم وتراثهم الغني.

تأسست مدينة عمان قديمًا تحت اسم "ربة عمان"، وتاريخها يمتد لآلاف السنين. وتعكس أدراجها القديمة هذا التاريخ العريق، حيث تم اكتشاف العديد من الأدراج الأثرية في مناطق مختلفة من المدينة. وتعود بناء هذه الأدراج إلى فترات زمنية مختلفة، بدءًا من العصور القديمة وصولاً إلى العصور الحديثة. وعلى الرغم من التغيرات التي شهدتها المدينة خلال القرون الماضية، إلا أن هذه الأدراج استطاعت الحفاظ على أصالتها وروعتها.

تأتي أدراج عمان بأشكال وأحجام مختلفة، حسب فترة بنائها واستخدامها. فهناك أدراج صغيرة يمكن أن تستوعب عددًا قليلاً من الدرجات، وهناك أدراج ضخمة تحتوي على مئات الدرجات. وتعتبر هذه الأدراج فعالة من حيث الاستخدام، حيث كانت تُستخدم لتسهيل حركة المشاة في المدينة، خاصة في المناطق الجبلية والمنحدرات الوعرة.

وتطلق على أدراج عمان المنتشرة في الشوارع والأزقة اسم "صواني الدرج"، وذلك لشكلها البارز الذي يشبه صواني الطعام. وبفضل هذا التصميم الفريد، تعتبر تلك الأدراج أيقونةً مميزةً لمدينة عمان.

إن أدراج عمان ليست مجرد بنى تحتية عادية، وإنما هي شهادة حية على التاريخ والثقافة العربية. فعندما تتجول في شوارع عمان وترى هذه الأدراج، ستشعر وكأنك تسافر عبر الزمن وتشهد تطور المدينة على مر العصور.

تحتوي أدراج عمان على العديد من الحكايات والذكريات لأهل المدينة. فقد استخدمت هذه الأدراج من قبل الأجداد والأجيال السابقة، وكانت تعتبر وسيلةً هامة للتنقل والتجارة والتجمعات الاجتماعية. وقد صمدت تلك الأدراج عبر العصور، وحاضرة لإحكام الوصلة بين الماضي والحاضر.

تعد أدراج عمان أيضًا وجهة جذب سياحي مهمة في المدينة. حيث يقصدها السياح من جميع أنحاء العالم للاستمتاع بجمالها وروعتها. وتعتبر هذه الأدراج من المشاهد الشعبية التي تبرز ثقافة المدينة وتاريخها العريق.

من الجدير بالذكر أن أدراج عمان القديمة تواجه تحديات في الحفاظ على وجودها وجمالها. فقد أصبحت بعض الأدراج متضررة بفعل مرور الزمن وتأثير العوامل الجوية، وأخرى تعرضت للتلف بسبب الأعمال البنائية والتطوير التي قامت بها المدينة. ولذلك، يُطالب الكثيرون بضرورة الحفاظ على هذه الأدراج التراثية والشعبية، وتوفير الصيانة اللازمة لها.

في الختام، تظل أدراج عمان القديمة شاهدةً على ماضي المدينة وحاضرها، وتعكس تنوعًا ثقافيًا وتاريخيًا غنيًا. إنها ليست مجرد تماثيل ومعالم تاريخية، بل هي شهادة حية تحمل ذكريات الناس وحكاياتهم. ومن المؤكد أن مدينة عمان ستستمر في الحفاظ على هذا الجزء الثمين من تراثها، لكي يستمتع به الأجيال القادمة.

The "Facial Action Coding System" is technology that can be used in the class room because some people can't figure out how good or bad someone is feeling. Teachers will be able to know if the student is learning or eithor not paying attention or sleeping in class. It'll be easier for them to know what's false and what's true expression in their situation they could be in.  In difference in the situation students can't understand someone's expression. Thanks to the technolgy now it'll be easier to figure out students emotion or anyone. The article states, " Using video imagery, the new emotion-recognition software tracks these facial movements- in a real face or in the painted face of Mona Lisa. By weighting the different units, the software can even identify mixed emotions. Each expression is compared against a neutral face.""The Mona Lisa demonstration is really intended to bring a smile to your face, while it shows just how much this computer can do."  Finally, yes the technology is worth a big margin but its worth to have the help we can all get to help us know many. In my opinion it'll be a better way to learn/read better on our emotional expressions because you"'ll have more information and could know more about everything you want or need to know about the expressions. Extracurricular activities are important for students, and I agree that all students must participate in at least one extracurricular activity. Students should try something new instead of doing nothing  Students can gain a lot from this experience, so I believe that they should participate in them.  I think that even if students don't want to participate in these activities, they should because they can learn things that they never knew before, and I think that it could make an impact on their lives.  Extracurricular activities are good for students to participate in because they can give you something to do  they can help you meet and befriend new people  and they can help kids find potential ideas and hobbies.  Extracurricular activities can give you something to do  Some of my friends go home and do nothing after school. It can get boring to have nothing to do for the remainder of the day. Participating in an after-school activity can pass time and help you to not be bored, especially if you are participating in an activity you enjoy. When I was in elementary school, I went to an after-school art club so I could pass the time doing something that I liked. I also did after-school soccer in the fourth grade, and I started playing volleyball in the fourth grade. I am still playing volleyball to this day. These kinds of activities can give you something to do instead of going on your phone and doing nothing. I have gotten more productive over the past couple of years because I participate in extracurricular activities. I believe that kids can be more productive, and extracurricular activities are a vital way to achieve this goal. Not only is it a good way to spend your time, but it is also a good way to meet people.
 Extracurricular activities are a good way to socialize with people because you are participating in activities and games that you enjoy with other people. You share the same interests, and liking the same things as someone else is a good way to bond and socialize with people. I met a lot of people through after-school volleyball, and I am still friends with most of them to this day. Our team would go out to restaurants after our games whether we won or lost because we were friends, and we liked to play together. We all liked playing the sport, so it was easy to make friends with each other. I also met a lot of people through my art club because we liked to draw, and we liked to talk to each other. If you have trouble making friends, you will most likely be able to socialize and bond with others through these events. I met one of my best friends through after-school dance classes when I was in elementary school. We enjoy dancing and listening to music together. Not only are extracurricular activities able to help you get to know people, but they can also help you find your interests.  Having schools require students to take at least one extracurricular activity can help them find hobbies, and they can help students find things that they didn't know they were interested in  For example, I once convinced my sister to play volleyball. She didn't really want to do it. After school that day, she came to our volleyball practice. She ended up loving the sport, and she also plays it to this day. There are many different activities, such as theater, art, sports, science and math clubs, and the student council. Students are most likely going to find an activity they like and stick with it as they get older. Doing an activity that you enjoy can be very entertaining, and you might keep doing it in the future. I am in my school's eighth grade chorus, and I want to continue this activity as I get into high school. If you really enjoy these activities at school, you might also try to practice them at home. If you like to go to an art club at your school, you might continue to draw at home. These activities can also lead to trying to improve in your hobby as well. I continue to draw at home so I can improve. Schools give access to these potential new hobbies and activities, and I think that students should go to them and give them a chance.  In conclusion, I believe that students should be required to take at least one extracurricular activity. It is something that I believe is crucial to who students grow up to be. If students join an after-school activity, they can become more responsible. Having them sit around all day can make that person lazy in the future. They not might want to try new things in the future because they were raised that way. Giving kids these potential interests can help impact their choices in life, such as what they want to do for a job or what they want to do for a hobby. People might already have their future planned, but joining an extracurricular activity can change their views and can give them new ideas. Overall, I think that extracurricular activities are a good way for students and kids to spend their time participating in and enjoying.

Come si può immaginare, l'adattamento per il grande schermo della serie di successo Entourage della HBO coinvolge alcune scene di sesso. E i casting per le scene più spinte ssi sono conclusi decisamente bene. Anche quando il regista Doug Ellin, accidentalmente, ha assunto due stelle del cinema per adulti: le porno attrici Spencer Scott e Anna Morna che hanno, ovviamente, battuto le altre aspiranti per le scene di sesso orale simulato. Il responsabile del loro arrivo sul set, però, sarebbe stato totalmente ignaro della loro carriera a luci rosse, tanto che il regista ha riconosciuto in loro del "talento" e le ha assunte. E non è la prima volta che accade. In passato, infatti, altre star a luci rosse hanno preso parte alla serie tv targata HBO, da Sasha Grey a Jesse Jane . Spencer Scott ha raccontato come è andata la scena incriminata. Ha spiegato che è stata costretta a girarla "un milione di volte". "Credo proprio che si stessero davvero divertendo quel giorno. Il regista continuava a dire che le mie tette lo facevano distrarre. Ha continuato a provare a cambiarmi di posizione – non voleva che il mio seno fosse sbattuto in faccia agli spettatori"

The "Face on Mars" is a prominent example of a pseudo-artifact, sparking debates and fueling curiosity about the possibility of extraterrestrial life and alien civilizations. This towering rock formation, resembling a human face upon observation from certain angles, became a subject of controversy due to its suggestive appearance. However, upon closer inspection and further scientific analysis, it is evident that the "Face on Mars" is merely a unique geological formation resulting from natural processes.

Those who advocate the interpretation of the "Face on Mars" as an artificial structure formulated by extraterrestrial beings typically base their arguments on three key points. Firstly, the distinctive resemblance of the formation to a human face evokes curiosity and speculation, triggering thoughts of potential alien creation. Secondly, some proponents highlight the alleged symmetry and precise arrangement of the formation, suggesting deliberate design rather than natural occurrence. Lastly, the perception of experts witnessing the discovery of other alleged artifacts on Mars further fuels the hypothesis that the "Face on Mars" may be a vestige of an extinct alien civilization.

However, contrary to the speculative claims, the scientific community predominantly rejects the idea of the "Face on Mars" being an artificial structure. The prevailing viewpoint asserts that the distinctive appearance of the formation results from inherent natural processes. Geological formations on Earth, such as hoodoos and natural arches, showcase the ability of wind and erosion to sculpt rocks into extraordinary shapes that sometimes resemble familiar objects. Consequently, researchers argue that a similar geological process is likely responsible for the formation of the "Face on Mars."

To substantiate their claims, scientists emphasize the absence of any other indicators of artificial activity on Mars, such as ruins or other apparent artifacts. Furthermore, astronomers have surveyed Mars using advanced technologies, yielding extensive data that contradict the hypothesis of a populated planet. Notably, the presence of oxygen on Mars would be essential to sustain life and advanced civilizations, yet no conclusive signs of oxygen have been detected.

In conclusion, while the "Face on Mars" may evoke curiosity and speculation about the possibility of alien life and civilizations, scientific analysis and empirical evidence overwhelmingly support a natural origin for the formation. As we continue to explore and gain a deeper understanding of Mars through advances in technology and research, it is essential to approach such phenomena with an open yet rational mindset, fostering a constructive dialogue that balances curiosity with scientific methodologies.

Wien - Erst zu Wochenbeginn hat die G7 der führenden Industrienationen  unter dem Vorsitz der deutschen Bundeskanzlerin Angela Merkel ein  Bekenntnis zur Begrenzung der Erderwärmung bei zwei Grad gegenüber der  vorindustriellen Zeit gemacht. Ohne entsprechende Anstrengungen auf der  Forschungsseite, insbesondere bei Energie wird das nicht zu machen sein,  sind sich vom STANDARD befragte Experten einig. Umso wichtiger, dass Österreichs Bilanz der Forschungsförderung bei  Energie in die richtige Richtung weist. 2014 wurden mit 143,1 Millionen  Euro so viel Forschungsmittel (exklusive des von der Industrie selbst  aufgewendeten Geldes) wie noch nie ausgegeben. 2013 waren es 121  Millionen Euro, in den Jahren davor rund 120 Millionen jeweils. Die  Erhöhung um 15 Prozent sei umso bemerkenswerter, als die  wirtschaftlichen Rahmenbedingungen alles andere als rosig gewesen seien  und die budgetären Restruktionen enorm, wie Michael Paula,  Abteilungsleiter Energie- und Umwelttechnologien im  Infrastrukturministerium, am Mittwoch bei einer Studienpräsentation  sagte. Österreich, lange Zeit Nachzügler bei Forschung und Entwicklung, hat im  Vorjahr zwar stark aufgeholt, hinkt vergleichbaren Ländern aber immer  noch hinterher. Liegt der Anteil der Energieforschung am  Bruttoinlandsprodukt (BIP) in Österreich derzeit bei 0,045 Prozent,  kommen Länder wie Dänemark, Niederlande oder Schweiz auf etwa die  doppelte Höhe. Finnland hatte bis vor zwei, drei Jahren einen beinahe  dreimal so hohen Anteil der Energieforschung am BIP, ist zuletzt aber  etwas zurückgefallen. Theresia Vogel, Geschäftsführerin des Klima- und Energiefonds (Klien),  verwies darauf, dass sich mit neuen Themen auch neue Unternehmen in die  Forschung einklinken. Derzeit etwa gibt es einen Schwerpunkt bei  Speichertechnologien. Unternehmen, die Geld vom Klien erhalten, müssen  zumindest dieselbe Summe dazulegen. Gewinner Windkraft Gewinner des Jahres 2014 war die Windkraft. Während  Biomasse-Technologien, aber auch Fotovoltaik und Solarthermie nicht  zuletzt unter dem Verfall der Ölpreise und dem vergleichsweise milden  Winter litten, legte die Windkraft in Österreich kräftig zu. Den Zubau um 411 Megawatt (MW) auf 2095 MW führte Stefan Moidl,  Geschäftsführer der IG Windkraft, unter anderem auf die stabil guten  Rahmenbedingungen in Österreich zurück. Was passiere, wenn dies nicht  der Fall sei, zeige das Beispiel Spanien, wo der Windkraftmarkt fast  komplett zusammengebrochen ist.
