L'Opera senza coro e orchestra è un fenomeno che sta guadagnando sempre più popolarità in tutto il mondo. Questo tipo di spettacolo consiste nella performance dell'opera da parte dei soli cantanti, con nessun accompagnamento strumentale o vocale proveniente dal coro o dall'orchestra tradizionale. Ciò offre agli artisti l'opportunità di esplorare nuove interpretazioni delle opere classiche, nonché di crearne di completamente originali. L'idea dell'Opera senza coro e orchestra ha le sue radici nei primi anni del Novecento, quando i compositori cercavano modi innovativi per presentare la loro musica al pubblico. Negli ultimi decenni, tuttavia, questa forma d'arte si è evoluta in qualcosa di molto diverso rispetto a ciò che era stato originariamente concepito. Oggi, l'Opera senza coro e orchestra viene utilizzata come piattaforma per sperimentazione ed espressione personale, consentendo ai musicisti di mettere in mostra le proprie abilità individualmente. Uno degli aspetti chiave dell'Opera senza coro e orchestra è la sua natura altamente interattiva. I concerti sono tipicamente tenuti in piccoli luoghi intimistici, dove gli spettatori possono avere una connessione diretta con lo spettacolo

Recentemente, il Congresso ha approvato un disegno di legge che consentirebbe al Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) degli Stati Uniti di accedere ai dati dei cittadini americani senza alcuna supervisione o controllo. Questa decisione è stata fortemente criticata da molti gruppi per la privacy e i diritti civili, poiché potrebbe portare a una sorveglianza su larga scala della popolazione americana. Il disegno di legge, noto come USA Freedom Act, è stato presentato alla Camera dei Rappresentanti nel 2015 ed era destinato a limitare le capacità del governo di raccogliere grandi quantità di dati sulla vita quotidiana delle persone. Tuttavia, l'ultima versione del disegno di legge contiene molte meno restrizioni rispetto all'originale proposto due anni fa. In particolare, consente ora alle agenzie governative come l'FBI di richiedere informazioni dettagliate sulle attività online dei cittadini americani senza alcun tipo di processo di revisione preliminare. Ciò significa che qualsiasi individuo può essere soggetto ad indagini basate solo sull'assunto dell'agenzia in questione

Indagini, inchieste e class acrion. Sono le prossime tappe dello scandalo Volkswagen . La procura tedesca di Brunswich ha fatto sapere in una nota che l'ex amministratore delegato del gruppo, Martin Winterkorn è sotto inchiesta per frode. " L'ufficio di criminalità economica della Procura - si legge nel comunicato - ha aperto l'inchiesta a causa di denunce penali contro il signor Winterkorn, lo scopo delle indagini è fare luce sulle responsabilità ". La procura vuole capire come sia avvenuta l'installazione dei software manipolati su 11 milioni di vetture diesel. Il Governo tedesco intanto, se da un lato torna a smentire di essere stato a conoscenza delle manipolazioni con il ministero dei Trasporti che dichiara di essere venuto a conocenza dei fatti solo una settimana fa; dall'altro lancia un aut aut al gruppo di Wolfsburg: entro il 7 ottobre la compagnia dovrà aver varato le misure per risolvere il problema del dispositvio anti-emissioni. Il ministero ha fatto sapere che Volkswagen è tenuta a " presentare misure vincolanti e un'agenda che prospetti le soluzioni tecniche riguardanti le tecnologie che le auto hanno implementato ". Intanto il "dieselgat" approva a Bruxelles

Title: Supporting Students in Balancing Academics and Extracurricular Activities

Introduction:
The issue of whether students with a B grade average should be allowed to participate in extracurricular activities despite struggling in school or on a particular subject is a subject of debate. This essay aims to analyze the potential benefits and drawbacks of such a policy and propose strategies for supporting these students in their academic and extracurricular pursuits.

Analysis of the Problem:
Allowing students with a B grade average to participate in extracurricular activities can have several benefits. Firstly, such activities can enhance students' overall development by fostering teamwork, leadership skills, and providing opportunities for personal growth. Participating in extracurricular activities can also provide stress relief, helping students maintain a healthy work-life balance. However, there are certain potential drawbacks to consider. If students are struggling academically and dedicating significant time to extracurricular pursuits, their grades may suffer further. This can lead to decreased motivation, compromised learning, and hinder their future academic endeavors.

Potential Implications:
If students with a B grade average are allowed to participate in extracurricular activities, it is essential to establish a supportive framework that ensures their academic progress does not deteriorate. One potential solution is implementing a mandatory study hall before or after extracurricular activities, where students can receive academic support, complete homework assignments, and seek clarification on challenging subjects. Additionally, providing mentorship programs or tutoring services specifically catered to these struggling students can help bridge the gap between their academic and extracurricular commitments.

Balancing Support for Academic and Extracurricular Pursuits:
Students' academic success should be prioritized, but their participation in extracurricular activities should not be overlooked. Schools can work with students to create personalized academic plans, ensuring they have ample time to focus on their studies. This may involve setting realistic goals, helping students manage their time effectively, and teaching them valuable skills, such as prioritization and organization. Furthermore, collaboration between teachers, extracurricular activity leaders, and parents can create an open line of communication to address any concerns and identify potential areas for improvement.

Importance and Impact of Proposed Solutions:
Addressing the issue of balancing academics and extracurricular activities is crucial for the overall well-being and development of students. By implementing the proposed solutions, schools can provide the necessary support for struggling students to excel academically while still participating in extracurricular activities. This approach not only enables students to develop their talents and passions but also teaches them valuable life skills such as time management and resilience, which are essential for their future endeavors.

Conclusion:
Allowing students with a B grade average to participate in extracurricular activities is a complicated issue that requires careful consideration. While such a policy can offer numerous benefits, it is imperative to address the potential drawbacks and provide appropriate support to ensure academic progress is not compromised. By implementing strategies such as study halls, mentorship programs, and personalized academic plans, schools can foster a conducive environment that allows students to successfully balance their academic and extracurricular pursuits. Ultimately, this approach supports the holistic development of students and equips them with the necessary skills for future success.

Some schools have adopted the practice of assigning summer projects to their students. There are several reasons behind this requirement, including the desire to ensure that students continue learning during their break. While this practice has its benefits, it also has some drawbacks. In this essay, I will discuss these reasons and analyze the effectiveness of summer projects in achieving their intended goal. Additionally, I will explore alternative methods that schools can use to ensure that students continue learning during their summer break.

One of the main reasons why schools require students to complete summer projects is to prevent learning loss during the break. Research has shown that students often experience a decline in academic skills over the summer months if they are not engaged in learning activities. Summer projects provide an opportunity for students to review and reinforce what they have learned during the school year, helping them to retain their knowledge and skills.

Another reason for assigning summer projects is to encourage independent learning and problem-solving skills. By working on a project outside of school, students are required to take initiative, manage their time effectively, and develop critical thinking skills. These abilities are essential for success in both academic and professional settings.

However, the practice of assigning summer projects also has its drawbacks. For some students, summer is a time to relax, recharge, and pursue other interests. Mandatory summer projects can take away from these valuable experiences and create unnecessary stress. Moreover, the effectiveness of these projects in ensuring that students continue learning varies. Some students may diligently complete their projects, while others may simply rush through them to fulfill the requirement without truly engaging with the material.

To address these concerns, schools can explore alternative methods to ensure that students continue learning during their summer break. For instance, schools can provide students with recommended reading lists or online learning platforms that offer engaging and educational content. Additionally, schools can organize summer camps or workshops focused on specific subjects to cater to students' interests while still providing a learning environment.

In conclusion, schools require students to complete summer projects to prevent learning loss and promote independent learning. While there are benefits to this practice, such as knowledge retention and the development of important skills, it also has some drawbacks, including potential stress and varying effectiveness. To mitigate these drawbacks, schools can explore alternative methods such as recommended reading lists and summer camps. Ultimately, the goal should be to strike a balance between ensuring students continue learning and allowing them to enjoy their summer break.

Driverless cars have the potential to revolutionize transportation as we know it. By eliminating human error, these autonomous vehicles could greatly reduce traffic deaths, increase mobility for disabled individuals, and increase the efficiency of cities by reducing jams and increasing the capacity of roads. However, there are still potential drawbacks to taking this technology to a widespread level.

One of the most pressing issues is the impact of driverless cars on motivation and potential for laziness. When driving is reduced to pressing a button, people may become more passive and less active in their daily lives. In addition, the cost of developing, rolling out, and maintaining a driverless system could be high, and those costs would likely be passed to consumers. Furthermore, safety is an important issue where driverless cars are concerned. Computer systems are still prone to errors and glitches, which could lead to car accidents, fatalities, and other safety hazards.

In my opinion, driverless cars should be regulated and put into widespread use with caution. The technology has great potential to reduce the amount of collisions and fatalities on the road, while providing more mobility options for the disabled. However, the potential drawbacks are too severe to ignore. In particular, the cost of rolling out this technology and the potential for safety and cybersecurity concerns should be closely monitored and planned for. Additionally, the impact driverless cars can have on motivation and laziness should be weighed against the potential benefits of providing increased independence to disabled individuals. With the proper precautions in place, I believe it is possible to roll out driverless cars responsibly, and that these vehicles should be widely available. 

Overall, driverless cars have great potential to reduce traffic fatalities, increase mobility, and improve the efficiency of cities. However, potential drawbacks like cost, safety, and motivation must be carefully weighed before this technology can be put into widespread use. With the proper precautions in place, I believe driverless cars could provide great benefit and be an important part of the transportation landscape in the near future.

Iqaluit - La risposta a Tremonti arriva da Mario Draghi. "Non c’è polemica. Tecnici e politici partecipano alla scrittura delle regole". Lo ha detto il governatore della Banca d’Italia Mario Draghi, spegnendo così possibili polemiche sul predominio dei politici sui tecnici per ciò che riguarda la scrittura delle nuove regole della finanza. Poi, davanti alla platea del G7 economico in Canada, Draghi ha contuato: "Non è vero che la nuova regolamentazione, la riforma Basilea 2 e 3, impedisce la ripresa. Non è vero contrariamente a quello che si dice in giro, perché verrà introdotta con la necessaria gradualità". Cos'aveva detto Tremonti "Le regole o le fanno gli Stati o non servono a niente. Se ne parla da due anni e le uniche che hanno preso forma sono quelle proposte unilateralmente dal presidente americano" così il ministro dell’Economia Giulio Tremonti nel suo intervento di ieri sottolineando come a suo avviso le regole devono essere "ex ante" così da fungere come deterrente. Le "regole sono politiche" aveva aggiunto Tremonti, precisando come le norme dovrebbero essere "a valle" ovvero "ex-ante", e non ex-post

Distance learning has become an increasingly popular option for people of all ages, but especially for students. The ability to learn at their own pace and to avoid physical classroom distractions and distractions from peers can be incredibly beneficial. Additionally, students are able to study in a comfortable and familiar environment, while also allowing for increased flexibility and time management. However, there are potential drawbacks of distance learning that should also be considered.

One argument that may be made against distance learning is that there is a lack of authority compared to a traditional classroom. Without the direct oversight of a teacher in the classroom, students may not be as motivated to stay engaged and to keep up with course material. It could also be argued that it might be difficult for students to ask questions or get feedback in a timely manner without an educator present.

Fortunately, technology can help to address some of these issues. Virtual classrooms and video conferencing tools offer the ability to communicate and collaborate with other students and faculty while still allowing individuals to work from home. Additionally, many distance learning programs offer assistance in terms of counseling and/or tutoring to help enhance the learning experience. This is especially important for students who are the most at risk of falling behind or becoming disengaged.

Overall, distance learning can be a great option for students to take advantage of, it should not be considered the only method of learning. It is important to implement solutions to address the lack of authority that can come with distance learning and to utilize technology as a tool to support the learning process. With the right supports in place, students can be successful in this format and be set up with the skills necessary to be successful in the future.

When making important decisions, seeking advice from multiple sources can be immensely beneficial. It provides us with diverse perspectives, knowledge, and insights that we might not have access to otherwise. Here are some key benefits of seeking advice from multiple sources:

1. Diverse Perspective: Advice from different sources helps us see a situation from various angles. Each person brings their own personal experiences, biases, and expertise, which can reveal alternatives and possibilities that we may not have considered. This diversity of thought can be especially useful when dealing with complex or multifaceted decisions.

2. Holistic Understanding: By seeking advice, we engage in a learning process that enhances our understanding of the situation. Listening to different viewpoints helps us grasp the nuances and complexities of the problem, enabling more informed decision-making. This holistic understanding strengthens our ability to make choices that consider multiple factors and long-term implications.

3. Creative Solutions: Multiple sources of advice can spark creativity in finding solutions. Each person may suggest different approaches or techniques, inspiring us to think outside the box and explore innovative resolutions. This creativity can be particularly valuable when tackling complex problems that demand fresh and unique solutions.

4. Confidence and Reluctance: Seeking advice can also help us gauge the confidence of others in our proposed decisions. If multiple people endorse a particular choice, it can boost our confidence in that decision. Conversely, if there is reluctance from certain sources, it may trigger caution and prompt us to investigate further, leading to more rigorous analysis and evaluation.

5. Error Reduction: By consulting with multiple sources, we can reduce the risk of error in our decisions. Different people may point out potential pitfalls or weaknesses in our plans that we may have overlooked. This collective scrutiny helps ensure that we have considered various possibilities and taken necessary precautions, minimizing the chances of regret or adverse outcomes.

In my personal experiences, seeking advice from multiple sources has been invaluable. For instance, when I was deciding on a career path, I sought guidance from various individuals, including mentors, professionals in different fields, and peers who had diverse interests. Their advice and insights helped me recognize my strengths, explore different options, and ultimately make an informed decision that aligned with my goals and values.

In conclusion, seeking advice from multiple sources when making important decisions offers a range of benefits. It grants us access to diverse perspectives, fosters holistic understanding, encourages creative solutions, aids in confidence building, and enhances error reduction. By embracing this approach, we can make better-informed decisions and increase our chances of positive outcomes. 

Would you like me to assist you in crafting a similar essay from a different perspective, such as arguing against seeking advice from multiple sources?

نحتفل جميعًا بنهاية العام ونستعد لاستقبال الأعياد بفرحة وسرور، ولكن في إدلب يحدث العكس تمامًا. يصف لوموند، أحد أهم الصحف الفرنسية، وضع الناس في محافظة إدلب بسوريا بأنه قيامة حقيقية. إدلب تواجه الدمار والخراب، حيث يحصد القصف المكثف العديد من المدنيين الأبرياء ويفر الآلاف بعائلاتهم في محاولة يائسة للنجاة.

تسببت النزاعات الداخلية في سوريا في نزوح كبير للسكان، حيث أجبرت العديد من الأسر على مغادرة منازلهم. ونتيجة لذلك، تجمعت الآلاف من الأشخاص في إدلب، وهم يعيشون في ظروف صعبة جدًا تحت القصف المستمر والحرمان من أبسط حقوقهم الإنسانية.

تقوم القيامة الحقيقية لهؤلاء الناس في إدلب، الذين فقدوا كل شيء بسبب الحرب، بمحاولة يائسة للبقاء على قيد الحياة. يعيشون في خيام متهالكة وسط أجواء باردة وعاصفة، ويعانون من نقص في الموارد الأساسية مثل الماء النظيف والطعام والدواء.

تحاول المنظمات الإنسانية المساعدة في تقديم المساعدة والإغاثة للأشخاص المهجرين في إدلب، لكن التحديات كبيرة. القصف المستمر يجعل من الصعب وصول المساعدات إلى المناطق المستهدفة، والموارد المحدودة تعيق تلبية احتياجات الكثيرين. بالإضافة إلى ذلك، يواجه العاملون الإنسانيون خطرًا مستمرًا على حياتهم أثناء تقديم المساعدة في ظل الأوضاع الأمنية السيئة.

تعيش القيامة في إدلب تحت تهديد مستمر من القنابل والهجمات الجوية. الفصائل المتمردة تكافح ضد القوات الموالية للحكومة، وخاصة القوات الروسية والسورية. هذا الصراع المستمر يضع حياة الآلاف من الأبرياء في خطر محدق، ويجعل من الصعب على الناس في إدلب استعادة حياة طبيعية.

المشهد المحزن في إدلب يحتاج إلى تدخل دولي لوقف العنف والحد من ويلات الحرب على المدنيين الأبرياء. ينبغي على المجتمع الدولي أن يعمل بجد للتوصل إلى حل سلمي يضمن توقف النزاعات وعودة السلام في سوريا.

بينما يحتفل العالم بأعياد نهاية العام، يجب أن نتذكر الأشخاص الذين يواجهون الموت والدمار والنزوح في إدلب. يجب علينا أن نساهم بأي شكل نستطيع في تقديم المساعدة والدعم لهؤلاء الأشخاص الذين يعانون في الظروف الصعبة. قد تكون صغيرة، مثل التبرع للمنظمات الإنسانية أو نشر الوعي حول الوضع الصعب في إدلب. كل جهد صغير يمكن أن يجعل فرقًا كبيرًا في حياة الناس ويعينهم على مواجهة التحديات والصمود في وجه الأوضاع الصعبة.

Stanno emergendo nuovi dettagli sul caso di stupro avvenuto a Prati, in cui un militare è stato arrestato con l'accusa di aver violentato una donna. Secondo la polizia, il soldato aveva pianificato attentamente l'attacco e si era addirittura assicurato che nessuno lo vedesse mentre commetteva il crimine. La vittima ha riferito alla polizia di essere stata aggredita da uno sconosciuto mentre camminava per le strade della città. L'aggressore l'ha trascinata in un vicolo buio dove l'ha brutalmente violentata prima di fuggire dalla scena del crimine. La vittima ha subito gravi lesioni fisiche ed emotive come risultato dell'assalto. Le indagini hanno rivelato che il presunto autore era un soldato delle forze armate italiane. Si crede che abbia pianificato l'intera operazione, comprese le misure preventive intraprese per garantire che non venisse visto o identificato durante l'atto. Inoltre, i detectives credono anche che fosse motivato dal desiderio sessuale anziché dall'odio verso la sua vittima

I would like to address a concern that seems to have the American people questioning their voting decisions. As a responible citizen of the United States of America, upholding your right to vote is an important duty. However,  in the case of nationally voting to decide our vital political figures, such as the President and Vice-President, the ballot of the Electoral College is not giving the voters of America a fair result when it comes to the final moments of a presidental election.  the electors for the state of which a citizen is voting in can be easily overturned to a vote for the canidate of which is opposite to what that citizen has elected to vote for.  The year of the 2000 campaign, Bush vs. Gore, for the presidency is an excellent example of how this Electoral College is unfair for voters. As Bradford Plumer has addressed in an excerpt of his writing: "The Indefensible Electoral College: Why even the best-laid defenses of the system are wrong" from

Mother Jones , he stated that Al Gore did indeed win the popular vote, but however he lost the presidency because of the quirks of the Electoral College. Also stated by Bradford Plumer is that "The American people should consider themselves lucky that the 2000 fiasco was the biggest election crisis in a century; the system allows for much worse".  Another example of how the Electoral College is unfair goes back to the 1960 campaign. Again stated by Bradford Plumer, "The segregationists in the Louisiana legislature had nearly come to success in replacing Democratic electors with new electors that would oppose John F. Kennedy." The state of Louisiana had attempted to do so because the popular vote for Kennedy, would not have actually gone to Kennedy; if they had succeeded in replacing those electors. There is also raise for concern in the event of a tie in a campaign. All 50 states would have only one vote and the selection of the House of Representatives would most likely not reflect the will of the American people. Also, the Senate chooses the vice-president.  As an American citizen looking forward to uphold my duty as a responible voter, I ask that we abloish the Electoral College and make the change to deciding among a popular vote. I believe that this change will engage Americans who respectfully choose not to vote to make the choice to vote. It will also give the citizens of America a more fair campaign to vote for when it comes time to vote for a new president.  Last but not least, the small percentage of voters who are visiting the ballots for the first time would have a better understanding of how the voting system works

Es ist bekannt, dass sich Comics häufig mit Fantasy-, Science-Fiction- oder Superhelden-Themen befassen. Doch in letzter Zeit bemerkt man eine zunehmende Tendenz, historische und politische Themen in Comics aufzugreifen.
Diese Comics behandeln ernsthafte Themen wie zum Beispiel die Geschichte des Holocausts oder die Umweltzerstörung und versuchen, Leser dazu zu bringen, auf diese dringenden Themen aufmerksam zu werden. Einige dieser Comics versuchen auch, historische Ereignisse und die damit verbundenen politischen Entwicklungen in eine unterhaltsame und zugängliche Form für Leser umzufassen.
Ein Beispiel ist die kürzlich veröffentlichte Comic-Serie „Die Abenteuer von Dina“, die Klimawandel und das Leben in ländlichen Gebieten zum Thema hat. Durch die Geschichte von Dinas Leben und ihrer Reise, versucht die Serie eine Art von Aufklärung über die Wichtigkeit des Umweltschutzes und regt Leser zum Nachdenken und Handeln an.
Auch einige Superhelden und Comicfigur werden dazu verwendet, um politische und soziale Themen anzusprechen. Ein bekanntes Beispiel ist die Geschichte von Captain America, die oft zur Diskussion von Themen wie Patriotismus und Freiheit genutzt wird. Ein weiterer ist die Black-Lives-Matter Bewegung, die durch die Charaktere von Miles Morales und Kamala Khan in der Marvel Comics-Serie behandelt wird.
Neben den historischen und politischen Themen, gibt es auch Comics, die sich mit gesellschaftlichen Themen wie Gleichberechtigung, Diskriminierung, psychischer Gesundheit und vielem mehr beschäftigen. Ein Beispiel ist die Comic-Serie "Die anderen Toten" von Joshua Logan, die sich mit Themen wie Rassismus und Vorurteilen zwischen Schwarzen und Lateinamerikanern aus einander setzt.
Die Fähigkeit von Comics, komplexe Themen in einer klaren und zugänglichen Art und Weise darzustellen, macht sie zu einem beliebten Medium für Verlage, die versuchen, Leser auf wichtige Themen aufmerksam zu machen. Obwohl viele Menschen immer noch Comics als Unterhaltung für Kinder betrachten, zeigt der Anstieg der historischen und politischen Comics eine neue Richtung des Mediums. Comics sind nicht nur für Freizeit, sondern auch für informatives Lesen von grundlegender Bedeutung geworden.
In Zusammenfassung gibt es immer mehr Comic-Serien, die sich mit historischen und politischen Themen beschäftigen, indem sie wichtige Themen wie Umweltzerstörung, Diskriminierung und die Geschichte des Holocausts ansprechen. Die Comics nutzen ihre klare und zugängliche Art, um Leser für diese Themen zu sensibilisieren und um ihnen eine neue Form der Infobeschaffung anzubieten. Comics sind also weit mehr als bloße Unterhaltung für Kinder und ermöglichen es Lesern, komplexe Themen auf eine neue Art und Weise zu betrachten.

Why only seek one opinion when you can get multiple? People often go to more than one person for advice when they need an opinion. If you only seek advice from one person you might not be very confident in your choice  The more people you get advice from, the better choice you can make.  Although one persons opinion might feel like enough, its better to get many  One person might have a slightly bias opinion on a situation. They also might give advice they ends up helping themselves more than you. When you get more opinions it is a less likely chance that all the opinions will be bias.  Getting more than one piece of advice could also help you feel more confident when making a decision.  If you only get one persons advice then you likely will not feel very confident while making the decision and might not be happy with your decision later. If you get multiple opinions you can feel confident in your decision and not dread about how it might be a bad decision. Being confident in your decision will make you feel like you made the right choice.
 Even if you get one bad opinion you do not agree with or think is a bad idea, it can help you see what choice you actually want and should make  When getting opinions you might be able to realize what you actually want and what would be the best decision. If you receive certain advice but do not like it, the opinion was still helpful to you because you can be more sure that you dont like that opinion and you like other opinions better. All together bad opinions also help with making good choices.  The more advice you receive the better choice you will end up making. More opinions will always help you feel more confident in your decision. Always seek more than one person for advice even if its not a major decision. Remember than all advice, whether good or bad, help you make the right decision.

Attending classes at school can be very beneficial for students because it allows them to interact directly with their teachers as well as other peers.  Students are able to ask questions when they do not understand something that is being taught or explained by one another.   They also have access to resources such as textbooks which provide additional information about topics discussed during lectures.
However, there may be some disadvantages associated with going to traditional classroom settings.   For example, if you live too far away from campus then commuting each day could take up quite a bit of valuable time.    In addition, many schools require students who attend certain courses (e.g., labs) to go into specific buildings where those courses will be held.   This means that even though you might only need to travel across town once per week,  you still must spend several hours traveling back-and-forth between different locations every single semester.
Another disadvantage related to going to traditional classroom settings involves having limited opportunities to engage in hands-on activities while taking part in group projects.   Many times these types of assignments involve working together to complete tasks like building models out of wood or clay.   However,...

Community service is a powerful tool that has been used to benefit both students and the communities they are a part of. Requiring students to perform community service can lead to a variety of meaningful outcomes for those involved. Primarily, it can change the mindset of students and act as a catalyst for improved academic performance.

First and foremost, requiring students to perform community service can instill a sense of responsibility and service in them. This can positively alter their outlook on life. For instance, students may become more engaged in their local community and understand the importance of using their resources to help others in need. By taking part in volunteer initiatives, students become more aware of the impact they can have, which helps them appreciate their roles in society. Through these experiences, they become more confident in their abilities to not only help their own communities, but also to help others as a part of the global community.

Additionally, this experience of helping others can improve student's academic performance as well. Performing community service can be a gateway to different kind of knowledge and skills. Working in a different setting and engaging with new people can enhance a student's understanding of the subject matter. Moreover, students can gain more learning skills such as problem-solving, time management, organization, and leadership, which can be invaluable when it comes to academic success.

Finally, requiring students to perform community service gives students the chance to give back to their community and to form meaningful connections with local citizens. This allows students to build personal relationships that go beyond the confines of the classroom. Moreover, this can lead to a deeper appreciation for one's own individuality and the lives of their peers. As a result, it can strengthen students' academic performance by creating a strong support system.

In conclusion, requiring students to perform community service can benefit students, their community, and everyone inbetween. The positive mindset it cultivates and the learning skills it offers can act as a powerful catalyst for improved academic performance. It can help students develop a sense of responsibility while also teaching them the importance of giving back to their community. Therefore, requiring students to perform community service can be invaluable to their growth both as an individual and as a student.

Roma - Un ragazzo romeno di 17 anni, alla guida di un furgone, ad alta velocità, ha investito e ucciso un padre di famiglia di 41 anni e ferito gravemente la moglie, di 42, e il figlio di 12, che viaggiavano su un'auto. E' accaduto nella serata di ieri ad Artena, un paese in provincia di Roma. Il pirata della strada, che è fuggito, è stato preso qualche ora dopo alla stazione Termini a Roma dai carabinieri della stazione di Artena. E' stato bloccato anche un suo connazionale di 36 anni, fuggito con lui, che era a bordo del furgone nel posto del passeggero. Il ragazzo, secondo i primi accertamenti, non era né ubriaco né drogato. Insieme al suo connazionale, stava viaggiando a bordo di un furgone Fiat lungo la strada provinciale 600 Ariana, ad Artena, quando ha invaso la corsia opposta della carreggiata scontrandosi contro una Ford Fiesta a bordo della quale viaggiava la famiglia. Il padre è morto sul colpo, mentre madre e bambino sono stati soccorsi e ricoverati in prognosi riservata nell'ospedale di Velletri. Dopo lo scontro i due sono fuggiti a piedi ma sono stati rintracciati dai militari dell'Arma, uno alla stazione Termini e l'altro alla stazione ferroviaria di Labico

Der Frust der Fans des FC Zürich hat sich nach dem Abstieg aus der Schweizer Super League in Gewalt entladen. Als Polizisten einen Umzug von rund 500 Personen, davon viele vermummt, vom Letzigrund-Stadion in Richtung Innenstadt stoppten, kam es zu heftigen Konfrontationen. Es wurden Scheiben eingeschlagen und Tische und Stühle von Restaurants beschädigt. Daraufhin bewarfen die wütenden Fans die Polizeikräfte mit Steinen und brennenden Fackeln. Die Stadtpolizei setzte Wasserwerfer, Reizstoff und Gummischrot ein. Der Mob, der noch rund 150 Personen umfasste, habe so zurückgedrängt werden können, schreibt der Tages-Anzeiger. Bereits im Letzigrund war es wenige Minuten nach Ende des bedeutungslosen 3:1-Siegs gegen den FC Vaduz zu Konflikten zwischen frustrierten Fans und dem privaten Sicherheitspersonal gekommen. Rund 60 vermummte FCZ-Fans drangen via Spielertunnel ins Stadioninnere vor. Die Spieler schlossen sich in den Garderoben ein, Zürich-Trainer Uli Forte und ein TV-Moderator mussten ein Interview abrupt abbrechen, um sich in Sicherheit zu bringen. Nach emotionalen Diskussionen gelang es den Sicherheitsbeamten aber, die Anhänger aus dem Stadion zu drängen. Zu Auseinandersetzungen kam es auch zwischen Anhängern von Grasshoppers und FC Zürich. Die Grasshoppers-Fans waren mit einem Extrazug vom Auswärtsspiel in Basel in der Heimat eingetroffen und 100 vermummte und mit Stöcken bewaffnete Personen suchten laut Züricher Stadtpolizei die Konfrontation mit den FCZ-Fans. Bitter Dem zwölffachen Meister FC Zürich (unter anderem 2006, 2007, 2009) hat auch ein klarer 3:1-Heimerfolg gegen den FC Vaduz in der letzten Runde am Mittwoch nicht zum Klassenerhalt gereicht, weil auch Kontrahent Lugano (3:0 gegen St. Gallen) siegreich blieb. Zürich hatte in 36 Spielen 34 Punkte geholt, Lugano rettete sich mit einem Zähler mehr über den Strich. Die Young Boys Bern erreichten mit Trainer Adi Hütter als Vizemeister hinter Marc Jankos FC Basel ihr Saisonziel. Für Barcelona und Madrid läuft es derzeit wie am Schnürchen. Zinedine Zidane hat Real die Spielfreude zurückgegeben, das Team schaffte im zweiten Spiel unter dem früheren französischen Weltklassekicker den zweiten Sieg. Nach einem 5:0 gegen Deportivo La Coruna gab es am Sonntag abermals zu Hause ein 5:1 (5:0) gegen Sporting Gijon. Real hielt damit Kontakt zum Spitzenreiter Atletico Madrid, der am Sonntagabend nach einem Doppelpack des Franzosen Antoine Griezmann mühelos 3:0 bei UD Las Palmas gewann. Real könnte den vierten Sieg in fünf Ligaspielen aber teuer bezahlt haben, Karim Benzema und Gareth Bale mussten verletzt ausgetauscht werden. Benzema erlitt bei einem Zusammenprall mit James Rodriguez eine Knöchelverletzung, Bale erwischte es erneut am Oberschenkel. Der Waliser hatte in dieser Saison bereits zweimal wegen Muskelproblemen mehrere Wochen pausieren müssen. Bale hatte den Torreigen per Kopf eröffnet (7.), Cristiano Ronaldo (9., 18.) und Benzema (12., 41.) trafen jeweils im Doppelpack. Zusammen hält das Trio mittlerweile bei 45 Ligatoren, je 16 davon gehen auf das Konto von Benzema und Ronaldo. Auch der FC Barcelona bleibt Atletico auf den Fersen. Die Katalanen feierten mit einem 6:0 gegen Athletic Bilbao ihren höchsten Saisonsieg. Der Rückstand auf den Spitzenreiter beträgt bei einem Spiel weniger weiterhin zwei Punkte, Real Madrid liegt weitere zwei zurück. Lionel Messi brachte Barca mit einem Foulelfmeter auf die Siegerstraße (7.), danach traf Luis Suarez in dreifacher Ausführung (47., 68., 82.). Der Uruguayer überholte damit Benzema und Ronaldo und führt nun mit 18 Treffern die Torschützenliste an. Für die weiteren Barca-Tore sorgten Neymar (31.) und Ivan Rakitic (62.).

The Electoral College is a fundamental feature of the United States presidential election system and should be kept in place instead of replacing it with a popular vote system. While the mainstream media often overlooks this important topic, the Electoral College serves several vital roles in upholding our democracy.

One key argument in favor of the Electoral College is that it ensures every state has a voice in the presidential election, regardless of its population size. In a popular vote system, candidates would likely focus their efforts on densely populated metropolitan areas, potentially neglecting rural and less populous regions. The Electoral College incentivizes candidates to build broader coalitions and consider the needs and concerns of all Americans, not just those in populous cities. This ensures a more representative democracy.

Moreover, the Electoral College reflects the federal nature of our government, which balances power between the national government and the states. Through the Electoral College system, states have a direct say in selecting the president, and this interplay between the popular vote and state-level elections preserves the balance of power. Eliminating the Electoral College would centralize power in the hands of the federal government, diminishing the influence of individual states and their unique perspectives.

From a historical perspective, the Electoral College is deeply rooted in our nation's founding principles. When designing the Electoral College system, the founders intended to safeguard against impulsive or irrational decision-making in choosing the president. They recognized that the electorate might make unwise choices based on temporary passions, and the Electoral College serves as a deliberate step that fosters a more thoughtful selection process. Additionally, the Electoral College has weathered many political storms since its inception, including conflicts, constitutional amendments, and social movements, demonstrating its resilience and adaptability.

In conclusion, the Electoral College is an essential component of our presidential election system, ensuring every state has a say, promoting consideration of diverse interests, and reflecting our federal structure. Its historical significance and its role in encouraging a more thoughtful choice for president make a strong case for retaining it. While the allure of a simple popular vote system is considerable, the consequences of such a change could diminish the representation of lesser-populated states and undermine the foundational principles of our democratic process.

Die PC-Version von Remedy Entertainments neuem Story-Shooter Quantum Break leidet unter massiven technischen Mängeln. Wie die Seite Digital Foundry in einer Analyse berichtet, müssten Käufer selbst unter High-end-Systemen gravierende Abstriche bei der Darstellung hinnehmen, überdies scheint Microsofts neue Laufzeitumgebung Universal Windows Platform (UWP) die Funktionalität des Spiels einzuschränken und die neue Schnittstellensammlung DirectX 12 bereite ebenfalls Probleme. Quantum Break ist vergangene Woche nicht nur für Xbox One erschienen, sondern auch exklusiv für Windows 10. Microsoft wollte den Titel auch als weiteres Verkaufsargument für das jüngste Betriebssystem des Konzerns nutzen. Wie die Tester berichten, sei es derzeit selbst auf sehr leistungsstarken PCs nicht möglich, konstante Bildraten und damit eine störungsfreie Darstellung zu bekommen. Auf 60Hz-Monitoren ließen sich zwar höhere Bildraten, aber keine konstante, ruckelfreie Bildausgabe erzielen. Wer die Option wählt, das Spiel mit gelockten 30fps darzustellen, werde ebenfalls enttäuscht, da es hier zu Screentearing komme. Eine weitere Enttäuschung berge die Darstellungsauflösung: Aufgrund Remedys Ausgabetechnik werde statt einem nativen 1080p-Bild ein rekonstruiertes 720p-Bild wiedergegeben. Das ist eine Technik, die bei einem normalen Sehabstand auf Fernsehern ein schönes Ergebnis liefert, aber wenn man vor einem hochauflösenden PC-Monitor sitzt, ist das Bild verschwommen und lässt an Details vermissen, schreibt Digital Foundry. Besonders störend sei, dass einige der Mängel wie das Framepacing von Usern bereits jetzt schon durch Workarounds behoben werden könnten, UWP einen jedoch daran hindere. So sei man gezwungen auf ein Update Microsofts zu warten, anstatt etablierte Tools für die Grafikkarte nutzen zu können. Ein weiterer ärgerlicher Fehler: Durch den UWP-Abgleich zwischen der PC-Version und der Xbox-One-Version wurde der fortgeschrittene Speicherstand der Konsolenversion überschrieben. Ein weiteres Hindernis stellen im jetzigen Zustand gewöhnliche Festplatten dar. Quantum Break nutzt eine Streamingtechnologie, um die Spielwelt laufend in den Speicher hereinzuladen und damit eine unterbrechungsfreie Erkundung der Umgebung zu realisieren. In der Praxis erfordere dies unter PCs jedoch eine SSD-Festplatte, da selbst schnelle Magnetscheiben zu langsam seien, um das Erlebnis ruckelfrei zu gestalten. Auf der Xbox One bestehe das Problem zwar auch, doch weit weniger störend, was auf eine höhere Optimierung schließen lässt. Enttäuschend sei nicht zuletzt, dass die PC-Version trotz potenziell höherer Leistungsressourcen kaum grafische Verbesserungen gegenüber der Konsolenversion mit sich bringe. Digital Foundry schreibt auch dies – genau wie alle genannten Mätzchen und kontinuierliche Abstürze aufgrund mangelhafter Grafiktreiber – der mangelhafte Optimierung des PC-Ausgabe zu. Dass Remedy einfach mehr Zeit benötigt hätte, sei allein schon daran zu erkennen, dass der Beenden-Button im Menü des Shooters vergessen wurde. So müsse man Quantum Break direkt über Windows (Alt-F4) schließen. Uns hat Quantum Break auf der Xbox One wirklich gefallen und das Versprechen, dass zusätzliche Leistungskapazitäten die Mängel ausbügeln und einen Spielgenuss bei 60fps erlauben könnten, war ein enormer Anreiz, die PC-Fassung zu kaufen, schreibt Digital Foundry. Aber unterm Strich ist die PC-Version eine massive Enttäuschung. Die wenigen Verbesserungen können die großen Performance- und Darstellungsprobleme nicht wettmachen. Wirklich ärgerlich daran ist, dass manche der Probleme bereits umgangen werden könnten, gäbe es nicht die Limitierungen der Universal Windows Platform.

أصيب خمسة أشخاص بجروح متفاوتة الخطورة جراء عملية طعن وقعت في منزل حاخام يهودي في بلدة شمالي نيويورك. ذكرت وسائل إعلام محلية أن المهاجم اقتحم المسكن وقام بتنفيذ عملية الطعن قبل أن يتم القبض عليه.

وبحسب المعلومات المتوفرة، فإن الحاخام وعائلته كانوا في المنزل في وقت وقوع الحادث. وتم نقل المصابين إلى المستشفى لتلقي العلاج اللازم، في حين باشرت السلطات التحقيق في الحادث والبحث عن دوافع المهاجم.

وتعتبر هذه الحادثة مؤشرًا آخر على تصاعد التوترات العنصرية والدينية في الولايات المتحدة، حيث شهدت المدن الأمريكية العديد من الهجمات على الجالية اليهودية في الفترة الأخيرة.

ومن المتوقع أن تستغل الحكومة الأمريكية استهداف الجالية اليهودية لتعزيز الجهود المبذولة لمكافحة التشدد العنصري وتعزيز الأمن والسلامة لجميع المواطنين.

La pandemia di Coronavirus ha causato un'enorme interruzione nella vita delle persone in tutto il mondo. In mezzo a questo caos, è emersa una nuova speranza sotto forma del vaccino contro la COVID-19 che potrebbe porre fine alla crisi globale e ripristinare l'ordine normale nelle nostre vite. Tuttavia, non tutti sono entusiasti riguardo al nuovo sviluppo poiché c'è ancora molta confusione su come funzioni effettivamente il vaccino e se sia sicuro o meno per gli esseri umani. In risposta all'annuncio della disponibilità del vaccino, alcuni hanno espresso preoccupazione sul fatto che possa essere utilizzato dagli opportunisti politici per approfittarsi della situazione e guadagnarci. Questa paura si baserebbe sull'idea che i governi potrebbero cercare di imporlo ai loro cittadini senza consultazioni adeguate con coloro che ne sarebbero direttamente influenzati. Ciò solleverebbe questioni etiche sulla libertà individuale e il diritto dei cittadini di prendere le proprie decisioni riguardanti la propria salute personale

While I agree that students who may struggle with anxiety or depression could benefit from video communication in school, I do not believe this is the role of the school. The purpose of school is to educate and prepare students for the real world, not form an alternative version of it. The best way to educate and prepare students for the real world is in person. The second best way is via live streaming video. The third best way is over video communication software such as Skype or Zoom. There are many reasons that in-person learning is the best way to educate and prepare students for the real world. First, student can see the facial expressions and body language of their teachers and peers. Without these critical pieces of information, students cannot adequately judge the credibility and of the information they are being taught. Second, in-person learning allows teachers to adapt lessons and course materials to meet the specific learning needs of individual students. Third, in-person learning allows for immediate feedback. This feedback allows teachers to assess a student’s knowledge and understanding of the material and, if necessary, provide additional instruction. Fourth, in-person learning allows students to ask questions of their teacher(s) which cannot be replicated over video communication software. Despite the many reasons that in-person learning is superior to video communication in the classroom, I understand that in many situations this may not be possible. If a student’s home is experiencing an emergency (e.g. a fire or flood), it may not be safe for that student to attend school. Even in situations where it may not be unsafe to attend school, a natural disaster could cause school buildings to be inoperable. Finally, some students may suffer from anxiety or depression such that video communication would be the best way to educate and prepare them for the real world. Given the wide variety of reasons that in-person learning is the best way to educate and prepare students for the real world, video communication should not be the school’s only method of delivering educational content. There are many useful lessons that can be learned via live video. However, the communication itself should not replace in-person learning. Instead, the lessons could be repackaged as a live stream and delivered in-person. By allowing for the educational content to be delivered in-person, the live stream can be easily supplemented and adapted to meet the specific needs of individual students.

In recent years, there has been a growing concern about the level of stress experienced by both students and teachers, particularly during the summer break. One possible solution to this issue is to implement student-designed summer assignments. By allowing students to have a say in their assignments, not only can stress be reduced, but also a greater sense of interest and motivation towards completion can be fostered.

Student-designed summer assignments would provide students with the opportunity to explore and pursue their own interests. Rather than being constrained by a standardized set of assignments, students could choose topics that resonate with their passions and personal goals. This autonomy would not only encourage a sense of ownership and responsibility for their own learning, but also promote a greater sense of motivation to complete the assignments.

Additionally, by involving students in the design process, teachers can gain valuable insights into the preferences and learning styles of their students. This understanding can help educators tailor their teaching methods and materials to better suit the needs of their students, ultimately enhancing the learning experience for both parties involved. Furthermore, by empowering students to take an active role in their learning, teachers can instill a sense of trust and respect in the classroom, which can lead to improved student-teacher relationships.

Moreover, student-designed summer assignments can help alleviate stress for teachers by reducing the workload and pressure of creating assignments for a large number of students. With students taking the lead in determining the content and format of their assignments, teachers can focus more on providing guidance and support rather than spending hours preparing materials. This shift in roles can help create a more balanced and less stressful environment for teachers, allowing them to fully engage with their students' learning process.

In conclusion, student-designed summer assignments have the potential to reduce stress for both students and teachers while promoting greater interest and motivation towards completion. By empowering students to choose their own assignments, educators can create a more personalized and engaging learning experience. Furthermore, by involving students in the design process, teachers can gain valuable insights and build stronger relationships with their students. It is essential to provide students with the autonomy and agency to shape their own learning experiences, ultimately fostering a culture of lifelong learning and growth.

I don't think students should be required to participate in an extracurricular activity because it takes time away from playing sports  reduces the socialization of students, and makes school seem boring. Some students are very dedicated to a sport on a travel team. Missing practice could negatively affect a student's performance in a game. In addition, coaches could think a player is slacking off if a player continuously misses practices. They may also believe that the player isn't interested in the sport, so they could kick him off the team. If a student is staying at school until five o'clock for an extracurricular activity, he doesn't have any time to go to his friend's house because he needs to do his homework when he arrives at his house. A student also won't be able to socialize because it will be able too dark by the time he gets home and settles in. In most cases, a person is famished when he comes home from a long day at school. After eating a snack, the sky will be pitch black. A student won't have any time to meet his friend. To begin, students already have to be at school for seven hours. Adding two hours to the day isn't a thrill to any student because it means students have to be at school for a longer time. In addition, if students don't have an interest in any of the school activities, they shouldn't be forced to choose one. They will dread coming to school because they will be forced to be part of an activity that is tedious for them.
 In conclusion, students shouldn't be required to participate in an extracurricular activity because it takes time away from playing sports, makes it harder to socialize, and makes school seem boring.

Limiting car usage and promoting other forms of transportation, such as public transit, walking, and biking, has numerous advantages that have greatly benefited communities like Vauban, Germany. One of the most significant benefits is the reduction in greenhouse gas emissions. Cars are a major contributor to climate change, and by limiting their use, communities can significantly reduce their environmental impact.

In addition to reducing emissions, limiting car usage also leads to improvements in air quality and public health. Gas-powered vehicles emit pollutants that can negatively affect air quality and result in respiratory problems and other health issues for residents. By reducing car usage, communities can promote healthier living environments for their citizens.

"Smart planning" is a concept that has been implemented in suburbs to further reduce car usage and promote more sustainable modes of transportation. This concept involves designing communities with a focus on walking and biking, with amenities located within walking distance and pedestrian-friendly infrastructure. This encourages residents to use active transportation instead of driving for daily errands and commutes, which leads to improved physical health and reduced car usage.

Public transportation plays a crucial role in serving suburbs and providing alternatives to car usage. It provides efficient and convenient travel options for residents, reducing the need for cars and the associated environmental and social impacts. Well-planned public transit systems can handle the transportation needs of suburb residents and promote social interaction within communities.

In conclusion, limiting car usage and promoting sustainable transportation options, such as public transportation, biking, and walking, offers numerous advantages for communities like Vauban, Germany. By reducing greenhouse gas emissions and improving air quality and public health, these initiatives contribute to creating more sustainable and resilient communities for future generations. The concept of "smart planning" encourages the design of pedestrian-friendly suburbs, further promoting the use of alternative transportation modes. Public transportation is a key component in providing efficient and accessible options for suburb residents, reducing car usage, and fostering a more environmentally and socially vibrant community.

I feel a need to adress that changing election by popular vote for the president of the United States over keeping electoral votes is, in my opinion, better for the people because it brings the U.S's people together in many ways.  The people of the U.S deserve to make great decisions like these, on account of the fact that us, the people, make most of what we have in America today, and though we work hard and may have fights sometimes, we still make choices together,voting being one of them, and this unifies us even more.  Allowing this will bring a sense of unification 
 . We already consider doing selfless acts just to make peace. Example: Our taxes pay doctors', polices', etc. salaries. We at least deserve to decide who enforces laws.  Another thing, to begin this reasoning let this question be asked: What is the government doing right now, this very moment? Who really knows, for sure? Not us. The people of the U.S really haven't an honest clue what's really going on behind the government, so it wouldn't be too wise for us to entrust the government into completely making every decision, decisions in which we could perfectly make ourselves.  So it not only gives us, the people, a sense of unification, it also gives a sense of direction so that we feel that we are not being blindly controlled by the government.  To commence the third reasoning let another question be asked: First, say for example that you work a double-shift, full-time, day and night just to keep food on your childrens' and wifes' plate, clothes on their backs, and a roof over their heads. When the bills roll in, your paycheck isn't won't arrive for weeks and you still haven't enough to pay, so you may have to work overtime if possible or pick up another job. No one gets rich off the government clearly, and yet we work so hard to just make it. Now here's the question: Doesn't it all feel worth it when the paycheck come in? Okay now for the deeper question: What is the sense or feeling you specifically get when you see you happy families' faces? Now for the point: Our work pays off. We work for the government (at least most of us does) together, whether to put bread on the table or otherwise. Now wouldnt it give us that sense of freedom that us hard workers get to make great decisions like these? It would.  All of these things bring us together more than we might even think, whether its families, friends, or just us as a nation.  To conclude all of the reasonings of arguing to change election to popular vote for the president of the U.S which are the sensation of unification, direction, and freedom, I'd be obliged to state that this is just one thing that finally unifies and brings the U.S's people together. Those three senses that this gives us is a seemingly small, yet great difference. And even though most don't realize it, it's definitely there.

Rund um die Evangelische Privatschule und die Evangelische Kooperative Mittelschule am Wiener Karlsplatz haben immer wieder Schutzzonen bestanden, um die Kinder vor der ausufernden Suchtmittelkriminalität zu schützen – zuletzt im Jahr 2013. Am Wiener Gürtel ist eine solche Maßnahme laut Polizei allerdings alleine wegen des enormen Personalaufwandes nicht möglich. Generell können Schutzzonen um Kindergärten und Schulen errichtet werden. Die Einrichtung erfolgt wegen einer bestehenden Bedrohung von Minderjährigen durch die Begehung von – nicht notwendigerweise unmittelbar gegen sie gerichteten – strafbaren Handlungen nach dem Strafgesetzbuch, dem Verbotsgesetz oder gerichtlich strafbaren Handlungen nach dem Suchtmittelgesetz. Diese dürfen von bestimmten Personen nicht betreten werden, ein Vergehen wird mit einer Verwaltungsstrafe geahndet. Um die Drogenproblematik entlang der U-Bahnlinie U6 in den Griff zu bekommen, sind Schutzzonen aber keine Option. Im Gegensatz zum Karlsplatz handelt es sich laut Polizeisprecher Patrick Maierhofer dabei nicht um einen klar begrenzten Ort, sondern um ein großflächiges Areal. Wir müssten von der U-Bahnstation Gumpendorfer Straße bis hin zur Josefstädterstraße komplett kontrollieren, das ist schon aufgrund des enormen Personalaufwandes nicht möglich, sagte Maierhofer. Zwar gibt es entlang des betroffenen Gebietes einige Kindergärten und Schulen, wie etwa in der Josefstädter Straße, doch würde sich bei einer Schutzzone das Problem einfach entlang des Gürtels verlagern. Die Szene ist sehr dynamisch, sagte Maierhofer. Gegen großflächige Schutzzonen spricht auch, dass innerhalb der Zone verschärfte rechtliche Rahmenbedingungen gelten würden und so eine polizeiliche Zwei-Klassen-Gesellschaft entstehen würde. Die Polizei setzt auf ihre Strategie der sichtbaren Präsenz. Es sind täglich hunderte Beamte an den Hot-Spots entlang der U6 im Einsatz, sagte Maierhofer. Eine Verbesserung der Situation verspricht man sich auch durch das ab 1. Juni in Kraft tretende strengere Drogengesetz. Ab dann gilt Suchtgifthandel im öffentlichen Raum als eigener Tatbestand.

In the article "Making Mona Lisa Smile" by Nick D'Alto, technology called the Facial Action Coding System enables computers to identify human emotions  The use of this technology should be used in schools to read the emotional expressions of students in a classroom  because being able to identify what might be bothering others could be beneficial  Young adults could be facing something serious in their life but may not have the right words to express how they feel. Finding help for those feeling down is difficult. Using this technology could help those in need. This technology can help with identifying if a student is happy or worried,  being able to have fun and put a smile on a students face while using this technology being able to identify if a student is confused or bored.
 The Facial Action Coding System can help with students and their emotions. "Of course, most students would have trouble actually describing each facial trait that conveys happy, worried, etc." (5). Not everyone can tell what an individual is feeling. The help of this technology can help those who need it most. It can help detect if a student is happy or worried Using this technology can help put a smile on your face in many ways. "The Mona Lisa demonstration is really intended to bring a smile to your face." (6). A lot of technology used today can put a smile on someone's face. Video games, social media, etc. Using the Facial Action Coding System is beneficial in many ways as well. It can help with being productive, getting help for a student who might need it. Technology can help with putting a smile on a students face Technology can help identify if a student is confused or bored and could also help them for later in the future.  "'A classroom computer could recognize when a student is becoming confused or bored," Dr. Huang predicts. "Then it could modify the lesson, like an effective human instructor.'" (6). Being able to identify a students emotions in a school could possibly help the student with getting better grades, feeling better about themselves, and passing each day with positivity. It can be difficult for a student to explain how they feel to another. The Facial Action Coding System has multiple ways on finding a solution for many problems that students are faced with today.  Today, many students are faced with difficult times. Students have to deal with so much during their schooling years and having difficult emotions to deal with also. The Facial Action Coding System could be very benificial to students and others. It can help with the problems that might hold them back from doing their best in school. This technology could help identify a student who is happy or worried, being able to have fun while using this technology, and being able to identify if a student is confused or bored.

Deutschland legt gleich mehrere Hitzetage in Folge hin. Der Deutsche Wetterdienst (DWD) meldet in vielen Teilen des Landes höchste Warnstufe. Die Temperaturenmessungen kratzen an der 40-Grad-Marke. Die Menschen schwitzen und suchen verzweifelt nach Abkühlung. Doch die ersehnte Abkühlung kommt bald: Am Wochenbeginn sollen vereinzelt Gewitter aufziehen und die Temperaturen erheblich senken.
Die bundesweite Hitzewelle ließ die Menschen auch am Wochenende nicht los. In zahlreichen Großstädten wurde bereits am frühen Morgen die Warnstufe Rot ausgerufen. Berlin sah am Samstag Temperaturen von 37 Grad Celsius, die Stadt Hamburg kratzte sogar an der 38-Grad-Marke. Viele Menschen suchten am Wochenende Erfrischung in Badeseen, Seen oder Freibädern. Doch auch hier haben die Besucher Probleme, eine kühle Erfrischung zu finden. Die Seen und Badestellen sind überfüllt. Der Andrang ist so groß, dass die Retter des Deutschen Roten Kreuzes (DRK) und der Wasserwacht an ihre Grenzen stoßen.
Der Deutsche Wetterdienst meldet jedoch eine Erleichterung in Form von Gewittern am Wochenbeginn. Die Gewitter sollen vereinzelt, aber besonders im Südwesten Deutschlands, aufziehen. Die Temperaturen sollen erheblich fallen. Die Meteorologen warnen jedoch zugleich vor Windstößen und Starkregen.
Die Politiker rufen zu besonderer Vorsicht auf. Der Bundesverkehrsminister Scheuer appelliert vor allem an Autofahrer. Diese sollten unbedingt genug Pausen einlegen und auf ihre Fahrweise achten, um nicht durch die Hitze unkonzentriert zu werden. Auch der Gesundheitsminister Spahn mahnt die Bevölkerung, ausreichend zu trinken. Ältere und kranke Menschen sollten zudem besonders geschützt werden.
Die Hitzewelle in Deutschland scheint noch nicht vorbei zu sein. Doch der ersehnte Regen und damit die Abkühlung sind in Sicht. Bis dahin müssen die Menschen verschiedene Maßnahmen ergreifen, um sich vor zu hohen Temperaturen zu schützen. Der DWD rät dazu, leichte Kleidung zu tragen, direkte Sonneneinstrahlung zu vermeiden und ausreichend Wasser zu trinken.  Auch nach Abkühlung gilt es für die Menschen, vorsichtig zu bleiben. Der Klimawandel lässt die Sommer in Deutschland heißer werden und damit den Körper immer wieder an seine Grenzen stoßen. Eine besondere Achtsamkeit sollte deshalb selbstverständlich werden.

Driverless cars have the potential to greatly improve road safety by eliminating the danger brought on by human error. By having the car take control of the vehicle in complex situations, driverless cars will allow vehicles to travel at higher speeds and make dynamic changes to the roadway, such as dodging disabled vehicles on the side of the road. Since there is no human involved in the driverless process, there will be no driver error, which can greatly increase the safety of the vehicles on the road. On the other hand, relying on technology to take the wheel of a car removes humans from the decision making process, which could have a great deal of downstream consequences. If the computers making decisions fail, the safety of the passengers is put at risk. In addition, computer systems can be programmed to optimize for efficiency over all other objectives, and as a result, safety may take a back seat. For example, in rainy weather conditions, it may not be safe for a driverless car to defer to the car in front of it when driving through a yellow light. Overall, driverless cars have the potential to reduce the number of accidents on the road, but only with proper regulatory control to ensure safety standards are met and the technology is not taking into account inefficient or unsafe situations. Mull of people driven car has the same question. I didn't notice any issues while using them. A couple of examples of unsafe decisions by the vehicle: 1. The vehicle swerved to the right despite the fact that the lane was clear, there was nothing to worry about. 2. The vehicle almost hit the curb because the prediction model failed to account for the speed of the vehicle and the proximity of the curb to the vehicle ahead of it.
